totalReadBytes, totalWriteBytes uint64\n243\t\n244\t\t\tfor name, current := range ioCounters {\n245\t\t\t\tif prev, exists := sc.prevIOCounters[name]; exists {\n246\t\t\t\t\ttotalReadBytes += current.ReadBytes - prev.ReadBytes\n247\t\t\t\t\ttotalWriteBytes += current.WriteBytes - prev.WriteBytes\n248\t\t\t\t}\n249\t\t\t}\n250\t\n251\t\t\tioMetrics.ReadBytesPerSec = float64(totalReadBytes) / duration\n252\t\t\tioMetrics.WriteBytesPerSec = float64(totalWriteBytes) / duration\n253\t\t}\n254\t\n255\t\t// Store current counters for next collection\n256\t\tsc.prevIOCounters = ioCounters\n257\t\tsc.prevIOTime = now\n258\t\n259\t\treturn ioMetrics\n260\t}\n261\t\n262\t// collectNetIO collects network I/O rate metrics\n263\tfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectNetIO() NetIOMetrics {\n264\t\tnetMetrics := NetIOMetrics{}\n265\t\n266\t\t// Get current network I/O counters\n267\t\tnetCounters, err := net.IOCounters(false) // false = aggregate all interfaces\n268\t\tif now.Sub(sc.prevNetTime).Seconds()\n280\t\n281\t\t// Calculate rates if we have previous data\n282\t\tif len(sc.prevNetCounters) > 0 && duration > 0 {\n283\t\t\t// Use aggregate stats (first element when pernic=false)\n284\t\t\tcurrent := netCounters[0]\n285\t\t\tprev := sc.prevNetCounters[0]\n286\t\n287\t\t\trecvBytes := current.BytesRecv - prev.BytesRecv\n288\t\t\tsentBytes := current.BytesSent - prev.BytesSent\n289\t\n290\t\t\tnetMetrics.RecvBytesPerSec = float64(recvBytes) / duration\n291\t\t\tnetMetrics.SentBytesPerSec = float64(sentBytes) / duration\n292\t\t}\n293\t\n294\t\t// Store current counters for next collection\n295\t\tsc.prevNetCounters = netCounters\n296\t\tsc.prevNetTime = now\n297\t\n298\t\treturn netMetrics\n299\t}\n300\t\n301\t// FormatBytes formats bytes as human-readable string (KB/MB/GB/TB)\n302\tfunc FormatBytes(bytes uint64) string {\n303\t\tconst unit = 1024\n304\t\tif bytes < unit {\n305\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%d B\", bytes)\n306\t\t}\n307\t\n308\t\tunits := []string{\"KB\", \"MB\", \"GB\", \"TB\", \"PB\"}\n309\t\tdiv, exp := uint64(unit), 0\n310\t\tfor n := bytes / unit; n >= unit && exp < len(units)-1; n /= unit {\n311\t\t\tdiv *= unit\n312\t\t\texp++\n313\t\t}\n314\t\n315\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.2f %s\", float64(bytes)/float64(div), units[exp])\n316\t}\n317\t\n318\t// FormatRate formats bytes per second as human-readable rate (KB/s, MB/s, GB/s)\n319\tfunc FormatRate(bytesPerSec float64) string {\n320\t\tconst unit = 1024.0\n321\t\tif bytesPerSec < unit {\n322\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.2f B/s\", bytesPerSec)\n323\t\t}\n324\t\n325\t\tunits := []string{\"KB/s\", \"MB/s\", \"GB/s\", \"TB/s\", \"PB/s\"}\n326\t\tdiv, exp := unit, 0\n327\t\tfor n := bytesPerSec / unit; n >= unit && exp < units[exp])\n333\t}\n334\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"call_2b6367fd7a404c49a63af96c","session_id":"46dd9a09-9794-47eb-ba89-5d565f83c2ad","uuid":"caeac084-59ca-48c3-888b-13649fe0c60a","timestamp":"2026-05-30T14:32:37.498Z","subagent_type":"Explore","task_description":"Explore {\n387\t\t\t// Pad with empty lines to fill the screen\n388\t\t\tpadding := strings.Repeat(\"\\n\", d.height-outputHeight-1)\n389\t\t\toutput = output + padding\n390\t\t}\n391\t\n392\t\treturn *metrics.TokenMetrics\n440\t\t\tvar tmux *metrics.TmuxMetrics\n441\t\n442\t\t\t// Use channels to collect results with timeout\n443\t\t\ttype systemResult struct {\n444\t\t\t\tmetrics *metrics.TmuxMetrics\n451\t\t\t}\n452\t\n453\t\t\tsystemChan := make(chan systemResult, 1)\n454\t\t\ttokenChan := make(chan tokenResult, 1)\n455\t\t\ttmuxChan := make(chan tmuxResult, 1)\n456\t\n457\t\t\t// System metrics: try cache first, collect if leader or cache miss\n458\t\t\tgo func() {\n459\t\t\t\tif !isLeader {\n460\t\t\t\t\tif data, ok := cache.GetCachedMetrics(metricTypeSystem); ok {\n461\t\t\t\t\t\tvar cached metrics.SystemMetrics\n462\t\t\t\t\t\tif json.Unmarshal(data, &cached) == nil {\n463\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsystemChan <- systemResult{metrics: cached}\n464\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn\n465\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n466\t\t\t\t\t}\n467\t\t\t\t}\n468\t\t\t\t// Leader or cache miss: collect fresh\n469\t\t\t\tm := d.systemCollector.Collect()\n470\t\t\t\tif isLeader {\n471\t\t\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(m); err == nil {\n472\t\t\t\t\t\tcache.SetCachedMetrics(metricTypeSystem, data)\n473\t\t\t\t\t}\n474\t\t\t\t}\n475\t\t\t\tsystemChan <- systemResult{metrics: m}\n476\t\t\t}()\n477\t\n478\t\t\t// Token metrics: always collect (uses shared DB, cheap to query)\n479\t\t\tgo func() {\n480\t\t\t\tt, _ := d.tokenCollector.Collect()\n481\t\t\t\ttokenChan <- tokenResult{metrics: t}\n482\t\t\t}()\n483\t\n484\t\t\t// Tmux metrics: try cache first, collect if leader or cache miss\n485\t\t\tgo func() {\n486\t\t\t\tif !isLeader {\n487\t\t\t\t\tif data, ok := cache.GetCachedMetrics(metricTypeTmux); ok {\n488\t\t\t\t\t\tvar cached metrics.TmuxMetrics\n489\t\t\t\t\t\tif json.Unmarshal(data, &cached) == nil {\n490\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttmuxChan <- tmuxResult{metrics: &cached}\n491\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn\n492\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n493\t\t\t\t\t}\n494\t\t\t\t}\n495\t\t\t\t// Leader or cache miss: collect fresh\n496\t\t\t\tm := d.tmuxCollector.Collect()\n497\t\t\t\tif isLeader {\n498\t\t\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(m); err == nil {\n499\t\t\t\t\t\tcache.SetCachedMetrics(metricTypeTmux, data)\n500\t\t\t\t\t}\n501\t\t\t\t}\n502\t\t\t\ttmuxChan <- tmuxResult{metrics: m}\n503\t\t\t}()\n504\t\n505\t\t\t// Wait for results with 3 second timeout\n506\t\t\ttimeout := time.After(3 * time.Second)\n507\t\n508\t\t\t// Collect results as they come in, or timeout\n509\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < 3; i++ {\n510\t\t\t\tselect {\n511\t\t\t\tcase r := <-systemChan:\n512\t\t\t\t\tsystem = r.metrics\n513\t\t\t\tcase r := <-tokenChan:\n514\t\t\t\t\ttokens = r.metrics\n515\t\t\t\tcase r := <-tmuxChan:\n516\t\t\t\t\ttmux = r.metrics\n517\t\t\t\tcase <-timeout:\n518\t\t\t\t\t// Return whatever we have so far\n519\t\t\t\t\treturn metricsMsg{\n520\t\t\t\t\t\tsystem: system,\n521\t\t\t\t\t\ttokens: tokens,\n522\t\t\t\t\t\ttmux:   tmux,\n523\t\t\t\t\t}\n524\t\t\t\t}\n525\t\t\t}\n526\t\n527\t\t\treturn metricsMsg{\n528\t\t\t\tsystem: system,\n529\t\t\t\ttokens: tokens,\n530\t\t\t\ttmux:   tmux,\n531\t\t\t}\n532\t\t}\n533\t}\n534\t\n535\t// calculateTokenPanelWidth determines the optimal width for the token panel\n536\t// based on actual content needs, returning the minimum width that displays well\n537\tfunc (d *Dashboard) calculateTokenPanelWidth() int {\n538\t\t// Base minimum for the panel structure (stacked layout)\n539\t\tminWidth := 46\n540\t\n541\t\t// If no token metrics or not available, use minimum\n542\t\tif d.tokenMetrics == nil || !d.tokenMetrics.Available {\n543\t\t\treturn minWidth\n544\t\t}\n545\t\n546\t\tmodelCount := len(d.tokenMetrics.ModelUsages)\n547\t\n548\t\t// Side-by-side layout needs:\n549\t\t// - Left column: 22 chars (stats)\n550\t\t// - Separator: 2 chars\n551\t\t// - Right column: ~24 chars (model name + cost)\n552\t\t// - Borders/padding: 4 chars\n553\t\t// Total: ~52 chars minimum for side-by-side\n554\t\tif modelCount > 0 {\n555\t\t\t// With models, use side-by-side layout\n556\t\t\t// More models = need slightly more height but same width\n557\t\t\treturn 54\n558\t\t}\n559\t\n560\t\t// Just basic token counts, no models - use narrow layout\n561\t\treturn minWidth\n562\t}\n563\t\n564\t// calculateTmuxPanelWidth determines the width needed for the TMUX panel\n565\t// based on session count and available height (to calculate columns needed)\n566\tfunc (d *Dashboard) calculateTmuxPanelWidth(panelHeight int) int {\n567\t\tconst minCellWidth = 28 // Minimum readable session cell\n568\t\tconst minWidth = 50     // Absolute minimum for 1 column\n569\t\tconst maxWidth = 120    // Cap to prevent TMUX from taking too much space\n570\t\n571\t\t// If no tmux metrics, use minimum\n572\t\tif d.tmuxMetrics == nil || !d.tmuxMetrics.Available {\n573\t\t\treturn minWidth\n574\t\t}\n575\t\n576\t\tsessionCount := len(d.tmuxMetrics.Sessions)\n577\t\tif sessionCount == 0 {\n578\t\t\treturn minWidth\n579\t\t}\n580\t\n581\t\t// Available lines for sessions: height - title(1) - borders(2)\n582\t\tavailableLines := panelHeight - 3\n583\t\tif availableLines < 1 {\n584\t\t\tavailableLines = 1\n585\t\t}\n586\t\n587\t\t// Calculate columns needed to fit all sessions\n588\t\tcols := 1\n589\t\tif sessionCount > availableLines {\n590\t\t\tcols = (sessionCount + availableLines - 1) / availableLines // ceil division\n591\t\t}\n592\t\tif cols > 4 {\n593\t\t\tcols = 4 // Reasonable maximum for readability\n594\t\t}\n595\t\n596\t\t// Width needed: columns * cellWidth + separators + borders/padding\n597\t\t// contentWidth = cols * cellWidth + (cols - 1) for separators\n598\t\t// panelWidth = contentWidth + 4 for borders/padding\n599\t\tneededWidth := cols*minCellWidth + (cols - 1) + 4\n600\t\n601\t\tif neededWidth < minWidth {\n602\t\t\treturn minWidth\n603\t\t}\n604\t\tif neededWidth > maxWidth {\n605\t\t\treturn maxWidth\n606\t\t}\n607\t\treturn neededWidth\n608\t}\n609\t\n610\t// getTmuxColumnCount returns the number of columns needed to display all sessions\n611\tfunc (d *Dashboard) getTmuxColumnCount(panelHeight int) int {\n612\t\tif d.tmuxMetrics == nil || !d.tmuxMetrics.Available {\n613\t\t\treturn 1\n614\t\t}\n615\t\n616\t\tsessionCount := len(d.tmuxMetrics.Sessions)\n617\t\tif sessionCount == 0 {\n618\t\t\treturn 1\n619\t\t}\n620\t\n621\t\tavailableLines := panelHeight - 3\n622\t\tif availableLines < 1 {\n623\t\t\tavailableLines = 1\n624\t\t}\n625\t\n626\t\tcols := 1\n627\t\tif sessionCount > availableLines {\n628\t\t\tcols = (sessionCount + availableLines - 1) / availableLines\n629\t\t}\n630\t\tif cols > 4 {\n631\t\t\tcols = 4\n632\t\t}\n633\t\treturn cols\n634\t}\n635\t\n636\t// renderUltraWide renders 3 panels side-by-side\n637\t// Balances space between Token and TMUX panels based on content needs\n638\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderUltraWide() string {\n639\t\t// Account for panel padding (0,1) which adds 2 chars per panel = 6 total\n640\t\ttotalPanelWidth := d.width - 6\n641\t\tpanelHeight := d.height - 3 // -2 borders, -1 status line\n642\t\n643\t\t// Step 1: System panel gets fixed width for CPU bars\n644\t\tsystemWidth := 60\n645\t\tif totalPanelWidth < 180 {\n646\t\t\tsystemWidth = 55\n647\t\t}\n648\t\n649\t\t// Step 2: Calculate minimum and ideal widths for both panels\n650\t\tminTokenWidth := 46\n651\t\tminTmuxWidth := d.calculateTmuxPanelWidth(panelHeight)\n652\t\n653\t\t// Ideal token width: side-by-side layout with comfortable model display\n654\t\t// Left column (22) + separator (2) + right column for models\n655\t\t// Right column needs: model name (up to 15) + cost (8) + tokens (12) = ~35\n656\t\t// Total ideal: 22 + 2 + 35 + 4 (borders) = 60\n657\t\tidealTokenWidth := 60\n658\t\n659\t\t// Ideal tmux width: minimum cell width + some padding for session names\n660\t\t// Use 35 chars per cell (28 min + 7 for longer names)\n661\t\tidealCellWidth := 35\n662\t\ttmuxCols := d.getTmuxColumnCount(panelHeight)\n663\t\tidealTmuxWidth := tmuxCols*idealCellWidth + (tmuxCols - 1) + 4\n664\t\n665\t\t// Available space after system panel\n666\t\tavailableWidth := totalPanelWidth - systemWidth\n667\t\n668\t\t// Start with minimums\n669\t\ttokenWidth := minTokenWidth\n670\t\ttmuxWidth := minTmuxWidth\n671\t\n672\t\t// Calculate how much each panel wants beyond minimum\n673\t\ttokenWant := idealTokenWidth - minTokenWidth\n674\t\tif tokenWant < 0 {\n675\t\t\ttokenWant = 0\n676\t\t}\n677\t\ttmuxWant := idealTmuxWidth - minTmuxWidth\n678\t\tif tmuxWant < 0 {\n679\t\t\ttmuxWant = 0\n680\t\t}\n681\t\n682\t\t// Distribute remaining space proportionally based on wants\n683\t\tremainingAfterMins := availableWidth - minTokenWidth - minTmuxWidth\n684\t\tif remainingAfterMins > 0 {\n685\t\t\ttotalWant := tokenWant + tmuxWant\n686\t\t\tif totalWant > 0 {\n687\t\t\t\t// Proportional allocation\n688\t\t\t\ttokenExtra := remainingAfterMins * tokenWant / totalWant\n689\t\t\t\ttmuxExtra := remainingAfterMins - tokenExtra\n690\t\t\t\ttokenWidth = minTokenWidth + tokenExtra\n691\t\t\t\ttmuxWidth = minTmuxWidth + tmuxExtra\n692\t\t\t} else {\n693\t\t\t\t// Neither wants more, split evenly\n694\t\t\t\ttokenWidth = minTokenWidth + remainingAfterMins/2\n695\t\t\t\ttmuxWidth = minTmuxWidth + remainingAfterMins - remainingAfterMins/2\n696\t\t\t}\n697\t\t} else if remainingAfterMins < 0 {\n698\t\t\t// Not enough space for both minimums - compress proportionally\n699\t\t\tdeficit := -remainingAfterMins\n700\t\t\ttotalMin := minTokenWidth + minTmuxWidth\n701\t\t\t// Reduce each panel proportionally to its minimum\n702\t\t\ttokenReduction := deficit * minTokenWidth / totalMin\n703\t\t\ttmuxReduction := deficit - tokenReduction\n704\t\t\ttokenWidth = minTokenWidth - tokenReduction\n705\t\t\ttmuxWidth = minTmuxWidth - tmuxReduction\n706\t\t\t// Enforce absolute minimums\n707\t\t\tif tokenWidth < 30 {\n708\t\t\t\ttokenWidth = 30\n709\t\t\t\ttmuxWidth = availableWidth - tokenWidth\n710\t\t\t}\n711\t\t\tif tmuxWidth < 30 {\n712\t\t\t\ttmuxWidth = 30\n713\t\t\t\ttokenWidth = availableWidth - tmuxWidth\n714\t\t\t}\n715\t\t}\n716\t\n717\t\t// Cap token panel - it doesn't need more than ideal\n718\t\tif tokenWidth > idealTokenWidth {\n719\t\t\texcess := tokenWidth - idealTokenWidth\n720\t\t\ttokenWidth = idealTokenWidth\n721\t\t\ttmuxWidth += excess\n722\t\t}\n723\t\n724\t\t// Final safety: ensure widths are positive\n725\t\tif tokenWidth < 1 {\n726\t\t\ttokenWidth = 1\n727\t\t}\n728\t\tif tmuxWidth < 1 {\n729\t\t\ttmuxWidth = 1\n730\t\t}\n731\t\n732\t\tsystemPanel := d.renderSystemPanel(systemWidth, panelHeight)\n733\t\ttokenPanel := d.renderTokenPanel(tokenWidth, panelHeight)\n734\t\ttmuxPanel := d.renderTmuxPanel(tmuxWidth, panelHeight)\n735\t\n736\t\t// Force all panels to exactly the same height using lipgloss\n737\t\t// This ensures borders align even if content varies\n738\t\tuniformHeight := lipgloss.NewStyle().Height(panelHeight)\n739\t\tsystemPanel = uniformHeight.Render(systemPanel)\n740\t\ttokenPanel = uniformHeight.Render(tokenPanel)\n741\t\ttmuxPanel = uniformHeight.Render(tmuxPanel)\n742\t\n743\t\t// Join horizontally with top alignment\n744\t\treturn lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Top,\n745\t\t\tsystemPanel,\n746\t\t\ttokenPanel,\n747\t\t\ttmuxPanel,\n748\t\t)\n749\t}\n750\t\n751\t// renderWide renders 2 panels on top, 1 on bottom\n752\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderWide() string {\n753\t\tpanelWidth := (d.width - 3) / 2 // 2 panels with spacing\n754\t\ttopHeight := (d.height - 4) / 2 // Split height\n755\t\tbottomHeight := d.height - topHeight - 4\n756\t\n757\t\tsystemPanel := d.renderSystemPanel(panelWidth, topHeight)\n758\t\ttokenPanel := d.renderTokenPanel(panelWidth, topHeight)\n759\t\ttmuxPanel := d.renderTmuxPanel(d.width-2, bottomHeight)\n760\t\n761\t\ttopRow := lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Top, systemPanel, \" \", tokenPanel)\n762\t\n763\t\treturn lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left, topRow, tmuxPanel)\n764\t}\n765\t\n766\t// renderNarrow renders panels stacked vertically\n767\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderNarrow() string {\n768\t\tpanelWidth := d.width - 2\n769\t\tpanelHeight := (d.height - 5) / 3 // 3 panels stacked\n770\t\n771\t\tsystemPanel := d.renderSystemPanel(panelWidth, panelHeight)\n772\t\ttokenPanel := d.renderTokenPanel(panelWidth, panelHeight)\n773\t\ttmuxPanel := d.renderTmuxPanel(panelWidth, panelHeight)\n774\t\n775\t\treturn lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left,\n776\t\t\tsystemPanel,\n777\t\t\ttokenPanel,\n778\t\t\ttmuxPanel,\n779\t\t)\n780\t}\n781\t\n782\t// renderCompact renders panels stacked vertically for narrow terminals (e.g. 75x68):\n783\t// tmux sessions on top, token usage in the middle, system resources on the bottom.\n784\t// Height is distributed with tmux getting extra rows since session lists are tall.\n785\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderCompact() string {\n786\t\tpanelWidth := d.width - 2\n787\t\tavailable := d.height - 8 // 3×2 border rows + 1 status line + 1 repo/updater line\n788\t\n789\t\t// Give tmux a bit more room — sessions need more lines than the other panels\n790\t\ttmuxHeight := available / 2\n791\t\tremaining := available - tmuxHeight\n792\t\ttokenHeight := remaining / 2\n793\t\tsystemHeight := remaining - tokenHeight\n794\t\n795\t\t// Enforce a sensible minimum so panels don't collapse\n796\t\tif tmuxHeight < 8 {\n797\t\t\ttmuxHeight = 8\n798\t\t}\n799\t\tif tokenHeight < 8 {\n800\t\t\ttokenHeight = 8\n801\t\t}\n802\t\tif systemHeight < 8 {\n803\t\t\tsystemHeight = 8\n804\t\t}\n805\t\n806\t\ttmuxPanel := d.renderTmuxPanel(panelWidth, tmuxHeight)\n807\t\ttokenPanel := d.renderTokenPanel(panelWidth, tokenHeight)\n808\t\tsystemPanel := d.renderSystemPanel(panelWidth, systemHeight)\n809\t\n810\t\treturn lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left,\n811\t\t\ttmuxPanel,\n812\t\t\ttokenPanel,\n813\t\t\tsystemPanel,\n814\t\t)\n815\t}\n816\t\n817\t// renderSystemPanel renders the system resources panel\n818\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderSystemPanel(width, height int) string {\n819\t\tstyle := panelStyle\n820\t\n821\t\tvar lines []string\n822\t\n823\t\t// Title (with emoji like unified-dashboard)\n824\t\tlines = append(lines, successStyle.Render(\"⚡ System Resources\"))\n825\t\n826\t\t// Load average\n827\t\tif d.systemMetrics.Load.Error == nil {\n828\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Load: %.2f %.2f %.2f\",\n829\t\t\t\td.systemMetrics.Load.Load1,\n830\t\t\t\td.systemMetrics.Load.Load5,\n831\t\t\t\td.systemMetrics.Load.Load15))\n832\t\t} else {\n833\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Load: N/A\"))\n834\t\t}\n835\t\n836\t\t// Calculate content width (panel width minus borders and padding)\n837\t\tcontentWidth := width - 4 // -2 for borders, -2 for padding\n838\t\n839\t\t// CPU Total - use same calculation method as Mem/Swap for consistent bar width\n840\t\tif d.systemMetrics.CPU.Error == nil {\n841\t\t\t// Format: \"CPU [|||||| XX.X%]\" - \"CPU \" is 4 chars\n842\t\t\tcpuBarWidth := contentWidth - 4 // Subtract \"CPU \" prefix\n843\t\t\tif cpuBarWidth < 10 {\n844\t\t\t\tcpuBarWidth = 10\n845\t\t\t}\n846\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"CPU %s\", d.renderBar(d.systemMetrics.CPU.TotalPercent, cpuBarWidth)))\n847\t\n848\t\t\t// CPU per-core - use up to 6 lines for CPU display\n849\t\t\tmaxCoreLines := 6\n850\t\t\ttotalCores := len(d.systemMetrics.CPU.PerCore)\n851\t\n852\t\t\t// Determine label width based on total cores (for alignment)\n853\t\t\tlabelWidth := 1\n854\t\t\tif totalCores >= 100 {\n855\t\t\t\tlabelWidth = 3\n856\t\t\t} else if totalCores >= 10 {\n857\t\t\t\tlabelWidth = 2\n858\t\t\t}\n859\t\n860\t\t\t// Determine cores per line\n861\t\t\tvar coresPerLine int\n862\t\t\tif totalCores <= 6 {\n863\t\t\t\tcoresPerLine = 1 // One core per line - bars stretch full width\n864\t\t\t} else {\n865\t\t\t\t// Multiple cores per line - calculate how many fit\n866\t\t\t\t// Each core needs: labelWidth + \":[\" + barContent + \"]\" + space\n867\t\t\t\t// Minimum reasonable bar content is about 12 chars\n868\t\t\t\tminCharsPerCore := labelWidth + 3 + 12 // label + \":[]\" + min bar\n869\t\t\t\tcoresPerLine = contentWidth / minCharsPerCore\n870\t\t\t\tif coresPerLine < 2 {\n871\t\t\t\t\tcoresPerLine = 2 // At least 2 per line when splitting\n872\t\t\t\t}\n873\t\t\t}\n874\t\n875\t\t\t// Calculate bar width for cores - align brackets by using fixed widths\n876\t\t\tvar barWidth int\n877\t\t\tif coresPerLine == 1 {\n878\t\t\t\t// Single core per line - match memory/swap calculation for consistency\n879\t\t\t\t// Format: \"NN:[||||... XXX%]\"\n880\t\t\t\t// labelWidth + \":[]\" = labelWidth + 3 chars overhead\n881\t\t\t\tbarWidth = contentWidth - labelWidth - 3\n882\t\t\t\tif barWidth < 10 {\n883\t\t\t\t\tbarWidth = 10\n884\t\t\t\t}\n885\t\t\t} else {\n886\t\t\t\t// Multiple cores per line - split width evenly\n887\t\t\t\t// Account for spaces between cores (1 space separator)\n888\t\t\t\tspacesBetween := coresPerLine - 1\n889\t\t\t\twidthPerCore := (contentWidth - spacesBetween) / coresPerLine\n890\t\t\t\t// Subtract label overhead: labelWidth + \":[]\"\n891\t\t\t\tbarWidth = widthPerCore - labelWidth - 3\n892\t\t\t\tif barWidth < 8 {\n893\t\t\t\t\tbarWidth = 8\n894\t\t\t\t}\n895\t\t\t}\n896\t\n897\t\t\t// Max cores we can display with 6 lines\n898\t\t\tmaxDisplayCores := coresPerLine * maxCoreLines\n899\t\t\tmaxCores := totalCores\n900\t\t\tif maxCores > maxDisplayCores {\n901\t\t\t\tmaxCores = maxDisplayCores\n902\t\t\t}\n903\t\n904\t\t\tvar coreLine strings.Builder\n905\t\t\tlinesUsed := 0\n906\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < maxCores; i++ {\n907\t\t\t\tif i > 0 && i%coresPerLine == 0 {\n908\t\t\t\t\t// Start new line\n909\t\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, coreLine.String())\n910\t\t\t\t\tcoreLine.Reset()\n911\t\t\t\t\tlinesUsed++\n912\t\t\t\t\tif linesUsed >= maxCoreLines {\n913\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n914\t\t\t\t\t}\n915\t\t\t\t}\n916\t\t\t\tif coreLine.Len() > 0 {\n917\t\t\t\t\tcoreLine.WriteString(\" \")\n918\t\t\t\t}\n919\t\t\t\t// Render progress bar for this core with calculated width\n920\t\t\t\t// Use consistent label width for alignment - brackets align because\n921\t\t\t\t// we use fixed-width labels and fixed-width bar content\n922\t\t\t\tpercent := d.systemMetrics.CPU.PerCore[i]\n923\t\t\t\tminiBar := d.renderMiniBar(percent, barWidth)\n924\t\t\t\tcoreLine.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%*d:[%s]\", labelWidth, i, miniBar))\n925\t\t\t}\n926\t\t\t// Add remaining cores on current line\n927\t\t\tif coreLine.Len() > 0 {\n928\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, coreLine.String())\n929\t\t\t}\n930\t\n931\t\t\tif totalCores > maxCores {\n932\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, dimStyle.Render(fmt.Sprintf(\"+%d more cores\", totalCores-maxCores)))\n933\t\t\t}\n934\t\t} else {\n935\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"CPU: N/A\"))\n936\t\t}\n937\t\n938\t\t// Memory - always compact (one line)\n939\t\tif d.systemMetrics.Memory.Error == nil {\n940\t\t\tmemUsed := metrics.FormatBytes(d.systemMetrics.Memory.Used)\n941\t\t\tmemTotal := metrics.FormatBytes(d.systemMetrics.Memory.Total)\n942\t\t\t// Format: \"Mem [||||...] XX.XX GB/XX.XX GB\"\n943\t\t\t// Calculate bar width: contentWidth - \"Mem \" (4) - \" \" (1) - \"used/total\" - margins\n944\t\t\tbarWidth := contentWidth - 5 - len(memUsed) - 1 - len(memTotal)\n945\t\t\tif barWidth < 10 {\n946\t\t\t\tbarWidth = 10\n947\t\t\t}\n948\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Mem %s %s/%s\",\n949\t\t\t\td.renderBar(d.systemMetrics.Memory.Percentage, barWidth),\n950\t\t\t\tmemUsed, memTotal))\n951\t\t} else {\n952\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Mem: N/A\"))\n953\t\t}\n954\t\n955\t\t// Swap - always compact (one line)\n956\t\tif d.systemMetrics.Swap.Error == nil && d.systemMetrics.Swap.Total > 0 {\n957\t\t\tswpUsed := metrics.FormatBytes(d.systemMetrics.Swap.Used)\n958\t\t\tswpTotal := metrics.FormatBytes(d.systemMetrics.Swap.Total)\n959\t\t\t// Use same calculation as Memory for consistency\n960\t\t\tbarWidth := contentWidth - 5 - len(swpUsed) - 1 - len(swpTotal)\n961\t\t\tif barWidth < 10 {\n962\t\t\t\tbarWidth = 10\n963\t\t\t}\n964\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Swp %s %s/%s\",\n965\t\t\t\td.renderBar(d.systemMetrics.Swap.Percentage, barWidth),\n966\t\t\t\tswpUsed, swpTotal))\n967\t\t}\n968\t\n969\t\t// Disk Usage - always compact (one line)\n970\t\tif d.systemMetrics.DiskUsage.Error == nil {\n971\t\t\tdiskUsed := metrics.FormatBytes(d.systemMetrics.DiskUsage.Used)\n972\t\t\tdiskTotal := metrics.FormatBytes(d.systemMetrics.DiskUsage.Total)\n973\t\t\t// Use same calculation as Memory for consistency\n974\t\t\tbarWidth := contentWidth - 5 - len(diskUsed) - 1 - len(diskTotal)\n975\t\t\tif barWidth < 10 {\n976\t\t\t\tbarWidth = 10\n977\t\t\t}\n978\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Dsk %s %s/%s\",\n979\t\t\t\td.renderBar(d.systemMetrics.DiskUsage.Percentage, barWidth),\n980\t\t\t\tdiskUsed, diskTotal))\n981\t\t} else {\n982\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Dsk: N/A\"))\n983\t\t}\n984\t\n985\t\t// Disk I/O - verbose format with pipe separators\n986\t\tif d.systemMetrics.DiskIO.Error == nil {\n987\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Disk I/O | Read: %s | Write: %s\",\n988\t\t\t\tmetrics.FormatRate(d.systemMetrics.DiskIO.ReadBytesPerSec),\n989\t\t\t\tmetrics.FormatRate(d.systemMetrics.DiskIO.WriteBytesPerSec)))\n990\t\t} else {\n991\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Disk I/O | N/A\"))\n992\t\t}\n993\t\n994\t\t// Net I/O - verbose format with pipe separators\n995\t\tif d.systemMetrics.NetIO.Error == nil {\n996\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Net I/O  | Recv: %s | Sent: %s\",\n997\t\t\t\tmetrics.FormatRate(d.systemMetrics.NetIO.RecvBytesPerSec),\n998\t\t\t\tmetrics.FormatRate(d.systemMetrics.NetIO.SentBytesPerSec)))\n999\t\t} else {\n1000\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Net I/O  | N/A\"))\n1001\t\t}\n1002\t\n1003\t\tcontent := strings.Join(lines, \"\\n\")\n1004\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(content)\n1005\t}\n1006\t\n1007\t// renderTokenPanel renders the token usage panel with side-by-side layout\n1008\t// Left side: Total token stats, Right side: Per-model costs\n1009\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderTokenPanel(width, height int) string {\n1010\t\tstyle := panelStyle\n1011\t\n1012\t\tif d.tokenMetrics == nil {\n1013\t\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(\"Loading token metrics...\")\n1014\t\t}\n1015\t\n1016\t\tcontentWidth := width - 4 // Account for borders and padding\n1017\t\n1018\t\t// Title with lookback info aligned right\n1019\t\ttitle := successStyle.Render(\"💰 Token Usage\")\n1020\t\tlookbackInfo := \"\"\n1021\t\tif d.tokenMetrics != nil && !d.tokenMetrics.LookbackFrom.IsZero() {\n1022\t\t\t// Format start time - use date if not this week\n1023\t\t\tnow := time.Now()\n1024\t\t\tstartTime := d.tokenMetrics.LookbackFrom\n1025\t\t\telapsed := now.Sub(startTime)\n1026\t\n1027\t\t\t// Choose format based on how long ago\n1028\t\t\tvar timeStr string\n1029\t\t\tif elapsed < 7*24*time.Hour {\n1030\t\t\t\ttimeStr = startTime.Format(\"Mon 3:04pm\")\n1031\t\t\t} else {\n1032\t\t\t\ttimeStr = startTime.Format(\"Jan 2 3:04pm\")\n1033\t\t\t}\n1034\t\n1035\t\t\t// Add human-readable duration\n1036\t\t\tdurationStr := metrics.FormatDuration(elapsed)\n1037\t\t\tlookbackInfo = dimStyle.Render(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s → Now (%s)\", timeStr, durationStr))\n1038\t\t} else if d.tokenMetrics != nil {\n1039\t\t\tlookbackInfo = dimStyle.Render(\"All time\")\n1040\t\t}\n1041\t\n1042\t\ttitleLen := lipgloss.Width(title)\n1043\t\tlookbackLen := lipgloss.Width(lookbackInfo)\n1044\t\tspacing := contentWidth - titleLen - lookbackLen\n1045\t\tif spacing < 1 {\n1046\t\t\tspacing = 1\n1047\t\t}\n1048\t\theaderLine := title + strings.Repeat(\" \", spacing) + lookbackInfo\n1049\t\n1050\t\tif !d.tokenMetrics.Available {\n1051\t\t\tvar lines []string\n1052\t\t\tlines = append(lines, headerLine)\n1053\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Not Available\"))\n1054\t\t\tif d.tokenMetrics.Error != \"\" {\n1055\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, wrapText(d.tokenMetrics.Error, width-4))\n1056\t\t\t}\n1057\t\t\tcontent := strings.Join(lines, \"\\n\")\n1058\t\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(content)\n1059\t\t}\n1060\t\n1061\t\t// Helper to get model style by name\n1062\t\tgetModelStyle := func(modelName string) lipgloss.Style {\n1063\t\t\tif strings.Contains(modelName, \"opus\") {\n1064\t\t\t\treturn lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color(\"#ff6b6b\")) // Red for Opus\n1065\t\t\t} else if strings.Contains(modelName, \"sonnet\") {\n1066\t\t\t\treturn lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color(\"#4ecdc4\")) // Cyan for Sonnet\n1067\t\t\t} else if strings.Contains(modelName, \"haiku\") {\n1068\t\t\t\treturn lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color(\"#95e1d3\")) // Light green for Haiku\n1069\t\t\t} else if strings.Contains(modelName, \"glm\") {\n1070\t\t\t\treturn lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color(\"#00bfff\")) // Blue for GLM\n1071\t\t\t}\n1072\t\t\treturn dimStyle\n1073\t\t}\n1074\t\n1075\t\t// Build left column: Total stats\n1076\t\tvar leftLines []string\n1077\t\thasCacheRead := d.tokenMetrics.CacheReadTokens > 0\n1078\t\thasCacheCreate := d.tokenMetrics.CacheCreationTokens > 0\n1079\t\thasRate := d.tokenMetrics.Rate > 0\n1080\t\thasAvg := d.tokenMetrics.SessionAvgRate > 0\n1081\t\n1082\t\t// Compact format for left column\n1083\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"In:    %s\", metrics.FormatTokensCompact(d.tokenMetrics.InputTokens)))\n1084\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Out:   %s\", metrics.FormatTokensCompact(d.tokenMetrics.OutputTokens)))\n1085\t\tif hasCacheRead {\n1086\t\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Cache: %s\", metrics.FormatTokensCompact(d.tokenMetrics.CacheReadTokens)))\n1087\t\t}\n1088\t\tif hasCacheCreate {\n1089\t\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Create:%s\", metrics.FormatTokensCompact(d.tokenMetrics.CacheCreationTokens)))\n1090\t\t}\n1091\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Total: %s\", boldStyle.Render(metrics.FormatTokensCompact(d.tokenMetrics.TotalTokens))))\n1092\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Reqs:  %d\", d.tokenMetrics.Prompts))\n1093\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Cost:  %s\", costStyle.Render(metrics.FormatCost(d.tokenMetrics.TotalCost))))\n1094\t\tif hasRate {\n1095\t\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Rate:  %s\", dimStyle.Render(metrics.FormatTokenRateCompact(d.tokenMetrics.Rate))))\n1096\t\t}\n1097\t\tif hasAvg {\n1098\t\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, fmt.Sprintf(\"Avg:   %s\", dimStyle.Render(metrics.FormatTokenRateCompact(d.tokenMetrics.SessionAvgRate))))\n1099\t\t}\n1100\t\n1101\t\t// Determine layout based on width\n1102\t\t// For narrow panels, stack vertically; for wider panels, use side-by-side\n1103\t\tmodelCount := len(d.tokenMetrics.ModelUsages)\n1104\t\tuseSideBySide := contentWidth >= 48 && modelCount > 0\n1105\t\n1106\t\t// Calculate available width for model names based on layout\n1107\t\t// In side-by-side: rightWidth = contentWidth - leftWidth(22) - separator(2)\n1108\t\t// Model line format: \"Name $XX.XX (XX,XXXtok)\" - cost ~8 chars, tokens ~12 chars = ~20 chars for cost+tokens\n1109\t\tleftWidth := 22\n1110\t\trightWidth := contentWidth - leftWidth - 2\n1111\t\tmaxModelNameWidth := rightWidth - 22 // Reserve space for cost and token count\n1112\t\tif maxModelNameWidth < 10 {\n1113\t\t\tmaxModelNameWidth = 10 // Minimum display width\n1114\t\t}\n1115\t\n1116\t\t// Build right column: Per-model costs with dynamic name width\n1117\t\tvar rightLines []string\n1118\t\tif modelCount > 0 {\n1119\t\t\trightLines = append(rightLines, boldStyle.Render(\"Models:\"))\n1120\t\t\tfor _, usage := range d.tokenMetrics.ModelUsages {\n1121\t\t\t\tdisplayName := shortenModelName(usage.Model)\n1122\t\t\t\t// Dynamically truncate based on available space\n1123\t\t\t\tif len(displayName) > maxModelNameWidth {\n1124\t\t\t\t\tdisplayName = displayName[:maxModelNameWidth-1] + \"…\"\n1125\t\t\t\t}\n1126\t\t\t\tmodelStyle := getModelStyle(usage.Model)\n1127\t\t\t\t// All model info on one line: Name Cost (Tokens)\n1128\t\t\t\tline := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s %s %s\",\n1129\t\t\t\t\tmodelStyle.Render(displayName),\n1130\t\t\t\t\tcostStyle.Render(metrics.FormatCost(usage.Cost)),\n1131\t\t\t\t\tdimStyle.Render(\"(\"+metrics.FormatTokensCompact(usage.TotalTokens)+\")\"))\n1132\t\t\t\trightLines = append(rightLines, line)\n1133\t\t\t}\n1134\t\t}\n1135\t\n1136\t\tvar lines []string\n1137\t\tlines = append(lines, headerLine)\n1138\t\n1139\t\tif useSideBySide {\n1140\t\t\t// Side-by-side: left column for totals, right for models\n1141\t\n1142\t\t\t// Pad columns to equal height\n1143\t\t\tmaxLines := len(leftLines)\n1144\t\t\tif len(rightLines) > maxLines {\n1145\t\t\t\tmaxLines = len(rightLines)\n1146\t\t\t}\n1147\t\t\tfor len(leftLines) < maxLines {\n1148\t\t\t\tleftLines = append(leftLines, \"\")\n1149\t\t\t}\n1150\t\t\tfor len(rightLines) < maxLines {\n1151\t\t\t\trightLines = append(rightLines, \"\")\n1152\t\t\t}\n1153\t\n1154\t\t\t// Combine columns\n1155\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < maxLines; i++ {\n1156\t\t\t\tleft := leftLines[i]\n1157\t\t\t\tright := rightLines[i]\n1158\t\t\t\t// Pad left to fixed width\n1159\t\t\t\tleftPadded := left + strings.Repeat(\" \", max(0, leftWidth-lipgloss.Width(left)))\n1160\t\t\t\t// Truncate right if needed (safety fallback)\n1161\t\t\t\tif lipgloss.Width(right) > rightWidth {\n1162\t\t\t\t\tright = right[:rightWidth-1] + \"…\"\n1163\t\t\t\t}\n1164\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, leftPadded+\"│ \"+right)\n1165\t\t\t}\n1166\t\t} else {\n1167\t\t\t// Stacked layout for narrow panels\n1168\t\t\tlines = append(lines, leftLines...)\n1169\t\t\tif modelCount > 0 {\n1170\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, \"\")\n1171\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, rightLines...)\n1172\t\t\t}\n1173\t\t}\n1174\t\n1175\t\tcontent := strings.Join(lines, \"\\n\")\n1176\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(content)\n1177\t}\n1178\t\n1179\t// shortenModelName shortens common model names for display\n1180\tfunc shortenModelName(name string) string {\n1181\t\t// Common patterns to shorten\n1182\t\treplacements := map[string]string{\n1183\t\t\t\"claude-opus-4-5-20251101\":    \"Opus 4.5\",\n1184\t\t\t\"claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929\":  \"Sonnet 4.5\",\n1185\t\t\t\"claude-haiku-4-5-20250929\":   \"Haiku 4.5\",\n1186\t\t\t\"claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022\":  \"Sonnet 3.5\",\n1187\t\t\t\"claude-3-5-haiku-20241022\":   \"Haiku 3.5\",\n1188\t\t\t\"claude-3-opus-20240229\":      \"Opus 3\",\n1189\t\t\t\"claude-3-sonnet-20240229\":    \"Sonnet 3\",\n1190\t\t\t\"claude-3-haiku-20240307\":     \"Haiku 3\",\n1191\t\t\t// GLM models (Zhipu AI)\n1192\t\t\t\"glm-4-alltools\":                \"GLM 4\",\n1193\t\t\t\"glm-4-9b-chat\":                \"GLM 4\",\n1194\t\t\t\"glm-4-air\":                     \"GLM 4\",\n1195\t\t\t\"glm-4-flash\":                   \"GLM 4\",\n1196\t\t\t\"glm-4-plus\":                    \"GLM 4+\",\n1197\t\t}\n1198\t\n1199\t\tif short, ok := replacements[name]; ok {\n1200\t\t\treturn short\n1201\t\t}\n1202\t\n1203\t\t// Try GLM partial matches\n1204\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"glm-4\") {\n1205\t\t\treturn \"GLM 4\"\n1206\t\t}\n1207\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"glm-3\") {\n1208\t\t\treturn \"GLM 3\"\n1209\t\t}\n1210\t\n1211\t\t// Try Claude partial matches\n1212\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"opus-4-5\") || strings.Contains(name, \"opus-4.5\") {\n1213\t\t\treturn \"Opus 4.5\"\n1214\t\t}\n1215\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"sonnet-4-5\") || strings.Contains(name, \"sonnet-4.5\") {\n1216\t\t\treturn \"Sonnet 4.5\"\n1217\t\t}\n1218\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"haiku-4-5\") || strings.Contains(name, \"haiku-4.5\") {\n1219\t\t\treturn \"Haiku 4.5\"\n1220\t\t}\n1221\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"opus\") {\n1222\t\t\treturn \"Opus\"\n1223\t\t}\n1224\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"sonnet\") {\n1225\t\t\treturn \"Sonnet\"\n1226\t\t}\n1227\t\tif strings.Contains(name, \"haiku\") {\n1228\t\t\treturn \"Haiku\"\n1229\t\t}\n1230\t\n1231\t\treturn name\n1232\t}\n1233\t\n1234\t// calculateRequiredTokenWidth calculates the minimum width needed for the token panel\n1235\t// based on the longest model name in the current data\n1236\tfunc (d *Dashboard) calculateRequiredTokenWidth() int {\n1237\t\t// Base width needed for: \"  Name: $XXX.XX (X,XXX,XXX tok)\"\n1238\t\t// 2 (indent) + name + 2 (\": \") + 8 (cost) + 2 (\" (\") + 11 (tokens) + 5 (\" tok)\") + 6 (borders/padding)\n1239\t\tconst baseWidth = 36 // Everything except model name\n1240\t\n1241\t\tmaxNameLen := 10 // Default minimum for \"Sonnet 4.5\"\n1242\t\n1243\t\tif d.tokenMetrics != nil && len(d.tokenMetrics.ModelUsages) > 0 {\n1244\t\t\tfor _, usage := range d.tokenMetrics.ModelUsages {\n1245\t\t\t\tdisplayName := shortenModelName(usage.Model)\n1246\t\t\t\tif len(displayName) > maxNameLen {\n1247\t\t\t\t\tmaxNameLen = len(displayName)\n1248\t\t\t\t}\n1249\t\t\t}\n1250\t\t}\n1251\t\n1252\t\treturn baseWidth + maxNameLen\n1253\t}\n1254\t\n1255\t// renderTmuxPanel renders the tmux sessions panel\n1256\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderTmuxPanel(width, height int) string {\n1257\t\tstyle := panelStyle\n1258\t\n1259\t\tif d.tmuxMetrics == nil {\n1260\t\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(\"Loading tmux metrics...\")\n1261\t\t}\n1262\t\n1263\t\tvar lines []string\n1264\t\n1265\t\t// Calculate content width for right-alignment\n1266\t\tcontentWidth := width - 4 // Account for borders and padding\n1267\t\n1268\t\t// Count sessions by status\n1269\t\tstatusCounts := make(map[metrics.SessionStatus]int)\n1270\t\tfor _, session := range d.tmuxMetrics.Sessions {\n1271\t\t\tstatusCounts[session.Status]++\n1272\t\t}\n1273\t\n1274\t\t// Build status summary (right-justified)\n1275\t\tvar statusParts []string\n1276\t\tif count := statusCounts[metrics.StatusWorking]; count > 0 {\n1277\t\t\tstatusParts = append(statusParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"🟢%d\", count))\n1278\t\t}\n1279\t\tif count := statusCounts[metrics.StatusReady]; count > 0 {\n1280\t\t\tstatusParts = append(statusParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"🔴%d\", count))\n1281\t\t}\n1282\t\tif count := statusCounts[metrics.StatusActive]; count > 0 {\n1283\t\t\tstatusParts = append(statusParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"🟡%d\", count))\n1284\t\t}\n1285\t\tif count := statusCounts[metrics.StatusError]; count > 0 {\n1286\t\t\tstatusParts = append(statusParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"❌%d\", count))\n1287\t\t}\n1288\t\tstatusSummary := strings.Join(statusParts, \" \")\n1289\t\n1290\t\t// Title with total count and status summary right-justified\n1291\t\t// Show source indicator: 🔗 for hooks, 📺 for tmux\n1292\t\tsourceIcon := \"📺\"\n1293\t\tsourceLabel := \"Sessions\"\n1294\t\tif d.tmuxMetrics.Source == \"hooks\" {\n1295\t\t\tsourceIcon = \"🔗\"\n1296\t\t\tsourceLabel = \"Sessions\"\n1297\t\t} else if d.tmuxMetrics.HooksInstalled && !d.tmuxMetrics.HooksAvailable {\n1298\t\t\t// Hooks installed but no hook sessions, falling back to tmux\n1299\t\t\tsourceLabel = \"Sessions (tmux)\"\n1300\t\t}\n1301\t\t// Show process count if different from tracked sessions (indicates detection gap)\n1302\t\tcountStr := fmt.Sprintf(\"%d\", d.tmuxMetrics.Total)\n1303\t\tif d.tmuxMetrics.RunningProcesses > 0 && d.tmuxMetrics.RunningProcesses != d.tmuxMetrics.Total {\n1304\t\t\tcountStr = fmt.Sprintf(\"%d/%d procs\", d.tmuxMetrics.Total, d.tmuxMetrics.RunningProcesses)\n1305\t\t}\n1306\t\ttitle := successStyle.Render(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s %s (%s)\", sourceIcon, sourceLabel, countStr))\n1307\t\ttitleLen := lipgloss.Width(title)\n1308\t\tsummaryLen := lipgloss.Width(statusSummary)\n1309\t\tspacing := contentWidth - titleLen - summaryLen\n1310\t\tif spacing < 1 {\n1311\t\t\tspacing = 1\n1312\t\t}\n1313\t\n1314\t\theaderLine := title + strings.Repeat(\" \", spacing) + statusSummary\n1315\t\tlines = append(lines, headerLine)\n1316\t\n1317\t\tif !d.tmuxMetrics.Available {\n1318\t\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Not Available\"))\n1319\t\t\tif d.tmuxMetrics.Error != \"\" {\n1320\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, wrapText(d.tmuxMetrics.Error, width-4))\n1321\t\t\t}\n1322\t\t\tcontent := strings.Join(lines, \"\\n\")\n1323\t\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(content)\n1324\t\t}\n1325\t\n1326\t\tif len(d.tmuxMetrics.Sessions) == 0 {\n1327\t\t\tlines = append(lines, \"No active sessions\")\n1328\t\t\tcontent := strings.Join(lines, \"\\n\")\n1329\t\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(content)\n1330\t\t}\n1331\t\n1332\t\t// Calculate available lines for sessions\n1333\t\t// height includes borders, subtract: title(1) + borders(2) = 3 lines overhead\n1334\t\tavailableLines := height - 3\n1335\t\tif availableLines < 1 {\n1336\t\t\tavailableLines = 1\n1337\t\t}\n1338\t\n1339\t\tsessionCount := len(d.tmuxMetrics.Sessions)\n1340\t\tcontentWidth = width - 4 // -4 for borders (2) and padding (2)\n1341\t\n1342\t\t// Calculate columns needed to show ALL sessions (priority: show everything)\n1343\t\tminCellWidth := 28  // Minimum readable session cell\n1344\t\tmaxCellWidth := 55  // Maximum cell width to avoid excessive whitespace\n1345\t\tcols := 1\n1346\t\tif sessionCount > availableLines {\n1347\t\t\t// Calculate columns needed to fit all sessions\n1348\t\t\tcols = (sessionCount + availableLines - 1) / availableLines // ceil division\n1349\t\t}\n1350\t\n1351\t\t// Cap columns based on available width\n1352\t\tmaxCols := contentWidth / minCellWidth\n1353\t\tif maxCols < 1 {\n1354\t\t\tmaxCols = 1\n1355\t\t}\n1356\t\tif cols > maxCols {\n1357\t\t\tcols = maxCols\n1358\t\t}\n1359\t\tif cols > 4 {\n1360\t\t\tcols = 4 // Reasonable maximum for readability\n1361\t\t}\n1362\t\n1363\t\t// Calculate cell width based on actual columns used, but cap to avoid whitespace.\n1364\t\t// Only add columns for aesthetic reasons (reducing cell width) when we're already\n1365\t\t// in multi-column mode due to session count — never force multiple columns purely\n1366\t\t// for width when sessions fit comfortably in one column.\n1367\t\tcellWidth := (contentWidth - (cols - 1)) / cols\n1368\t\tif cols > 1 && cellWidth > maxCellWidth {\n1369\t\t\t// Increase columns to reduce cell width\n1370\t\t\toptimalCols := (contentWidth + maxCellWidth - 1) / maxCellWidth\n1371\t\t\tif optimalCols > cols && optimalCols <= 4 {\n1372\t\t\t\tcols = optimalCols\n1373\t\t\t\tcellWidth = (contentWidth - (cols - 1)) / cols\n1374\t\t\t} else {\n1375\t\t\t\t// Can't add more columns, just cap the width\n1376\t\t\t\tcellWidth = maxCellWidth\n1377\t\t\t}\n1378\t\t}\n1379\t\n1380\t\t// Show ALL sessions - calculate how many we can actually display\n1381\t\tmaxDisplayed := availableLines * cols\n1382\t\tmaxSessions := sessionCount\n1383\t\tif maxSessions > maxDisplayed {\n1384\t\t\tmaxSessions = maxDisplayed // Only limit if we truly can't fit more\n1385\t\t}\n1386\t\n1387\t\t// Render sessions in vertical columns (fill first column, then second, etc.)\n1388\t\trowCount := (maxSessions + cols - 1) / cols\n1389\t\tfor row := 0; row < rowCount; row++ {\n1390\t\t\tvar rowCells []string\n1391\t\t\tfor col := 0; col < cols; col++ {\n1392\t\t\t\tidx := col*rowCount + row\n1393\t\t\t\tif idx < maxSessions {\n1394\t\t\t\t\tsession := d.tmuxMetrics.Sessions[idx]\n1395\t\t\t\t\tcellContent := d.renderSessionCell(session, cellWidth)\n1396\t\t\t\t\t// Apply explicit width constraint using lipgloss\n1397\t\t\t\t\tcellStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(cellWidth)\n1398\t\t\t\t\tcell := cellStyle.Render(cellContent)\n1399\t\t\t\t\trowCells = append(rowCells, cell)\n1400\t\t\t\t} else {\n1401\t\t\t\t\t// Empty cell for alignment\n1402\t\t\t\t\temptyCell := lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(cellWidth).Render(\"\")\n1403\t\t\t\t\trowCells = append(rowCells, emptyCell)\n1404\t\t\t\t}\n1405\t\t\t}\n1406\t\t\t// Join cells with space separator for multiple columns\n1407\t\t\tseparator := \"\"\n1408\t\t\tif cols > 1 {\n1409\t\t\t\tseparator = \" \"\n1410\t\t\t}\n1411\t\t\tif len(rowCells) == 1 {\n1412\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, rowCells[0])\n1413\t\t\t} else {\n1414\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, strings.Join(rowCells, separator))\n1415\t\t\t}\n1416\t\t}\n1417\t\n1418\t\t// Show \"... and X more\" if sessions were limited\n1419\t\tif maxSessions < sessionCount {\n1420\t\t\tremaining := sessionCount - maxSessions\n1421\t\t\tlines = append(lines, dimStyle.Render(fmt.Sprintf(\"... +%d more\", remaining)))\n1422\t\t}\n1423\t\n1424\t\tcontent := strings.Join(lines, \"\\n\")\n1425\t\treturn style.Width(width).Height(height).Render(content)\n1426\t}\n1427\t\n1428\t// renderSessionCell renders a single tmux session cell\n1429\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderSessionCell(session metrics.TmuxSession, width int) string {\n1430\t\temoji := session.Status.GetEmoji()\n1431\t\n1432\t\t// Convert ANSI color codes to hex colors for lipgloss\n1433\t\tcolorMap := map[string]string{\n1434\t\t\t\"\\033[32m\": \"#00ff00\", // Green - WORKING (Claude processing)\n1435\t\t\t\"\\033[31m\": \"#ff0000\", // Red - READY (Waiting for input)\n1436\t\t\t\"\\033[33m\": \"#ffff00\", // Yellow - ACTIVE (User in session)\n1437\t\t\t\"\\033[91m\": \"#ff5555\", // Bright Red - ERROR (Error state)\n1438\t\t\t\"\\033[0m\":  \"#ffffff\", // White/Reset\n1439\t\t}\n1440\t\n1441\t\tansiColor := session.Status.GetColor()\n1442\t\tcolor, ok := colorMap[ansiColor]\n1443\t\tif !ok {\n1444\t\t\tcolor = \"#ffffff\"\n1445\t\t}\n1446\t\n1447\t\tstatusStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(lipgloss.Color(color))\n1448\t\n1449\t\tattached := \"\"\n1450\t\tattachedWidth := 0\n1451\t\tif session.Attached {\n1452\t\t\tattached = \"📎\"\n1453\t\t\tattachedWidth = 3 // emoji + space\n1454\t\t}\n1455\t\n1456\t\t// Format: emoji name status windows idle attached\n1457\t\tstatusText := string(session.Status)\n1458\t\tif len(statusText) > 7 {\n1459\t\t\tstatusText = statusText[:7]\n1460\t\t}\n1461\t\n1462\t\t// Format idle duration\n1463\t\tidleStr := \"\"\n1464\t\tif session.IdleDuration > 0 {\n1465\t\t\tif session.IdleDuration < time.Minute {\n1466\t\t\t\tidleStr = fmt.Sprintf(\"%ds\", int(session.IdleDuration.Seconds()))\n1467\t\t\t} else if session.IdleDuration < time.Hour {\n1468\t\t\t\tidleStr = fmt.Sprintf(\"%dm\", int(session.IdleDuration.Minutes()))\n1469\t\t\t} else {\n1470\t\t\t\tidleStr = fmt.Sprintf(\"%dh\", int(session.IdleDuration.Hours()))\n1471\t\t\t}\n1472\t\t}\n1473\t\n1474\t\t// Calculate available width for session name\n1475\t\t// Fixed parts: emoji(2) + space(1) + space(1) + status(7) + space(1) + windows(~3) + space(1) + idle(3) + space(1) + attached\n1476\t\t// Fixed overhead = ~20 chars + attachedWidth\n1477\t\tfixedOverhead := 20 + attachedWidth\n1478\t\tmaxNameLen := width - fixedOverhead\n1479\t\tif maxNameLen < 6 {\n1480\t\t\tmaxNameLen = 6 // Minimum readable name length\n1481\t\t}\n1482\t\n1483\t\tname := session.Name\n1484\t\tif len(name) > maxNameLen {\n1485\t\t\tname = name[:maxNameLen-1] + \"…\"\n1486\t\t}\n1487\t\n1488\t\t// Build the line with dynamic name width\n1489\t\tnameFormat := fmt.Sprintf(\"%%-%ds\", maxNameLen)\n1490\t\tline := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s \"+nameFormat+\" %s %dw %-3s %s\",\n1491\t\t\temoji,\n1492\t\t\tname,\n1493\t\t\tstatusStyle.Render(fmt.Sprintf(\"%-7s\", statusText)),\n1494\t\t\tsession.Windows,\n1495\t\t\tidleStr,\n1496\t\t\tattached)\n1497\t\n1498\t\treturn line\n1499\t}\n1500\t\n1501\t// renderLookbackPicker renders the lookback time picker overlay\n1502\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderLookbackPicker() string {\n1503\t\tpanelHeight := d.height - 3\n1504\t\tpanelWidth := 60\n1505\t\tif panelWidth > d.width-4 {\n1506\t\t\tpanelWidth = d.width - 4\n1507\t\t}\n1508\t\n1509\t\tvar lines []string\n1510\t\n1511\t\t// Title\n1512\t\tlines = append(lines, boldStyle.Render(\"📅 Token Usage Lookback\"))\n1513\t\tlines = append(lines, \"\")\n1514\t\n1515\t\tif d.lookbackCustomMode {\n1516\t\t\t// Custom date/time picker\n1517\t\t\tlines = append(lines, \"Set custom start date/time:\")\n1518\t\t\tlines = append(lines, \"\")\n1519\t\n1520\t\t\t// Date/time fields\n1521\t\t\tyear := d.lookbackCustomDate.Year()\n1522\t\t\tmonth := int(d.lookbackCustomDate.Month())\n1523\t\t\tday := d.lookbackCustomDate.Day()\n1524\t\t\thour := d.lookbackCustomDate.Hour()\n1525\t\t\tminute := d.lookbackCustomDate.Minute()\n1526\t\n1527\t\t\t// Highlight selected field\n1528\t\t\tfieldStyle := dimStyle\n1529\t\t\tselectedStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().\n1530\t\t\t\tBackground(lipgloss.Color(\"#00aaff\")).\n1531\t\t\t\tForeground(lipgloss.Color(\"#000000\")).\n1532\t\t\t\tBold(true)\n1533\t\n1534\t\t\tyearStr := fmt.Sprintf(\" %04d \", year)\n1535\t\t\tmonthStr := fmt.Sprintf(\" %02d \", month)\n1536\t\t\tdayStr := fmt.Sprintf(\" %02d \", day)\n1537\t\t\thourStr := fmt.Sprintf(\" %02d \", hour)\n1538\t\t\tminStr := fmt.Sprintf(\" %02d \", minute)\n1539\t\n1540\t\t\tif d.lookbackEditField == 0 {\n1541\t\t\t\tyearStr = selectedStyle.Render(yearStr)\n1542\t\t\t} else {\n1543\t\t\t\tyearStr = fieldStyle.Render(yearStr)\n1544\t\t\t}\n1545\t\t\tif d.lookbackEditField == 1 {\n1546\t\t\t\tmonthStr = selectedStyle.Render(monthStr)\n1547\t\t\t} else {\n1548\t\t\t\tmonthStr = fieldStyle.Render(monthStr)\n1549\t\t\t}\n1550\t\t\tif d.lookbackEditField == 2 {\n1551\t\t\t\tdayStr = selectedStyle.Render(dayStr)\n1552\t\t\t} else {\n1553\t\t\t\tdayStr = fieldStyle.Render(dayStr)\n1554\t\t\t}\n1555\t\t\tif d.lookbackEditField == 3 {\n1556\t\t\t\thourStr = selectedStyle.Render(hourStr)\n1557\t\t\t} else {\n1558\t\t\t\thourStr = fieldStyle.Render(hourStr)\n1559\t\t\t}\n1560\t\t\tif d.lookbackEditField == 4 {\n1561\t\t\t\tminStr = selectedStyle.Render(minStr)\n1562\t\t\t} else {\n1563\t\t\t\tminStr = fieldStyle.Render(minStr)\n1564\t\t\t}\n1565\t\n1566\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"  Date: %s-%s-%s\", yearStr, monthStr, dayStr))\n1567\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"  Time: %s:%s\", hourStr, minStr))\n1568\t\t\tlines = append(lines, \"\")\n1569\t\t\tlines = append(lines, dimStyle.Render(\"  ↑/↓: adjust value  ←/→/Tab: change field\"))\n1570\t\t\tlines = append(lines, dimStyle.Render(\"  Enter: apply  Esc: back to presets\"))\n1571\t\t} else {\n1572\t\t\t// Preset selection\n1573\t\t\t// Calculate available content lines: panelHeight - 4 (borders + padding)\n1574\t\t\tavailableLines := panelHeight - 4\n1575\t\t\t// Compact mode needed if: title(1) + instruction(1) + presets(7*2=14) + nav(1) = 17 > available\n1576\t\t\t// Use compact single-line format when height is constrained\n1577\t\t\tcompactMode := availableLines < 17\n1578\t\n1579\t\t\tlines = append(lines, \"Select a lookback period:\")\n1580\t\t\tif !compactMode {\n1581\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, \"\")\n1582\t\t\t}\n1583\t\n1584\t\t\tfor i, preset := range d.lookbackPresets {\n1585\t\t\t\tprefix := \"  \"\n1586\t\t\t\tstyle := dimStyle\n1587\t\t\t\tif i == d.lookbackSelectedIndex {\n1588\t\t\t\t\tprefix = \"▶ \"\n1589\t\t\t\t\tstyle = successStyle\n1590\t\t\t\t}\n1591\t\n1592\t\t\t\t// Show time for presets with GetTime\n1593\t\t\t\ttimeStr := \"\"\n1594\t\t\t\tif preset.GetTime != nil {\n1595\t\t\t\t\tt := preset.GetTime()\n1596\t\t\t\t\tif !t.IsZero() {\n1597\t\t\t\t\t\ttimeStr = fmt.Sprintf(\" (%s)\", t.Format(\"Jan 2 3:04pm\"))\n1598\t\t\t\t\t}\n1599\t\t\t\t}\n1600\t\n1601\t\t\t\tif compactMode {\n1602\t\t\t\t\t// Single-line compact format: \"▶ Name - Description (time)\"\n1603\t\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s %s%s\",\n1604\t\t\t\t\t\tprefix,\n1605\t\t\t\t\t\tstyle.Render(preset.Name),\n1606\t\t\t\t\t\tdimStyle.Render(\"- \"+preset.Description),\n1607\t\t\t\t\t\tdimStyle.Render(timeStr)))\n1608\t\t\t\t} else {\n1609\t\t\t\t\t// Full two-line format\n1610\t\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s\",\n1611\t\t\t\t\t\tprefix,\n1612\t\t\t\t\t\tstyle.Render(preset.Name),\n1613\t\t\t\t\t\tdimStyle.Render(timeStr)))\n1614\t\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"   %s\", dimStyle.Render(preset.Description)))\n1615\t\t\t\t}\n1616\t\t\t}\n1617\t\n1618\t\t\tif !compactMode {\n1619\t\t\t\tlines = append(lines, \"\")\n1620\t\t\t}\n1621\t\t\tlines = append(lines, dimStyle.Render(\"  ↑/↓/j/k: navigate  Enter/Space: select  Esc/l: close\"))\n1622\t\t}\n1623\t\n1624\t\t// Build the picker panel\n1625\t\tcontent := strings.Join(lines, \"\\n\")\n1626\t\n1627\t\tpickerStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().\n1628\t\t\tBorderStyle(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).\n1629\t\t\tBorderForeground(lipgloss.Color(\"#ffaa00\")).\n1630\t\t\tPadding(1, 2).\n1631\t\t\tWidth(panelWidth).\n1632\t\t\tHeight(panelHeight)\n1633\t\n1634\t\tpicker := pickerStyle.Render(content)\n1635\t\n1636\t\t// Center the picker on screen\n1637\t\tleftPad := (d.width - panelWidth) / 2\n1638\t\tif leftPad < 0 {\n1639\t\t\tleftPad = 0\n1640\t\t}\n1641\t\n1642\t\treturn lipgloss.NewStyle().PaddingLeft(leftPad).Render(picker)\n1643\t}\n1644\t\n1645\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderHelpView() string {\n1646\t\tpanelHeight := d.height - 3\n1647\t\ttotalPanelWidth := d.width - 2 // Match normal view width calculation\n1648\t\tpanelWidth := (totalPanelWidth * 40) / 100 // 40% for panel\n1649\t\n1650\t\tvar panel string\n1651\t\tvar helpText string\n1652\t\tvar title string\n1653\t\n1654\t\tswitch d.helpMode {\n1655\t\tcase 1: // System Resources\n1656\t\t\ttitle = \"System Resources Panel\"\n1657\t\t\tpanel = d.renderSystemPanel(panelWidth, panelHeight)\n1658\t\t\thelpText = `Real-time system metrics updated every 2s:\n1659\t\n1660\tCPU: Overall + per-core usage as N:[||| XX%]\n1661\t  Colors: Green<60% Yellow60-79% Orange80-94% Red≥95%\n1662\t  ≤6 cores: one per line, >6: multiple per line\n1663\t\n1664\tMemory/Swap: Used/Total with percentage bars\n1665\t  Formatted in GB/MB for readability\n1666\t\n1667\tDisk: Root filesystem (/) usage with percentage bar\n1668\t  Shows used/total space in GB/TB\n1669\t\n1670\tDisk I/O: Read/write speeds in bytes/s or KB/s\n1671\t\n1672\tNet I/O: Network recv/sent speeds\n1673\t\n1674\tLoad: 1min, 5min, 15min averages\n1675\t  Indicates overall system activity level`\n1676\t\n1677\t\tcase 2: // Token Usage\n1678\t\t\ttitle = \"Token Usage Panel\"\n1679\t\t\tpanel = d.renderTokenPanel(panelWidth, panelHeight)\n1680\t\t\thelpText = `Tracks token usage from ~/.claude/projects (Claude) and zai-proxy metrics (GLM):\n1681\t\n1682\tTokens:\n1683\t  In/Out: Input/output tokens\n1684\t  Cache Read/Create: Cache operations (Claude only)\n1685\t  Total: All tokens combined\n1686\t  Cost: Estimated API cost ($)\n1687\t\n1688\tRates:\n1689\t  Rate: Current tok/min (60s window)\n1690\t  Avg: Session average tok/min\n1691\t\n1692\tTime:\n1693\t  Span: Duration of lookback period\n1694\t  Active: Time since first activity in period\n1695\t\n1696\tLookback: Press 'l' to open time picker\n1697\t  Presets: Today, 24h, 7d, 30d, All time\n1698\t  Custom: Set specific date/time with arrows\n1699\t\n1700\tModels: Per-model cost breakdown\n1701\t  Color-coded: Opus(red) Sonnet(cyan) Haiku(green) GLM(blue)\n1702\t  Sorted by cost (highest first)\n1703\t\n1704\tData Sources:\n1705\t  - Claude: ~/.claude/projects/*.jsonl (sessions)\n1706\t  - GLM: Not currently tracked (zai-proxy only exports Prometheus)\n1707\t\n1708\tSQLite Cache: .ccdash/tokens.db\n1709\t  Queryable with DuckDB or any SQLite tool\n1710\t  Tables: token_events, file_state\n1711\t  Incremental ingestion with deduplication`\n1712\t\n1713\t\tcase 3: // TMUX Sessions\n1714\t\t\ttitle = \"TMUX Sessions Panel\"\n1715\t\t\tpanel = d.renderTmuxPanel(panelWidth, panelHeight)\n1716\t\t\thelpText = `Monitors tmux sessions running Claude Code:\n1717\t\n1718\tTitle: Shows total count + status summary\n1719\t  Format: \"📺 TMUX Sessions (N) 🟢2 🔴1\"\n1720\t\n1721\tStatus (analyzes pane content):\n1722\t  🟢 WORKING - Claude Code processing\n1723\t  🔴 READY - Waiting for user input\n1724\t  🟡 ACTIVE - User in session\n1725\t  ❌ ERROR - Error or undefined state\n1726\t\n1727\tDetection: Analyzes last 15 lines for:\n1728\t  Working indicators, prompts, errors\n1729\t\n1730\tSession Info:\n1731\t  Name, status, windows (Xw), idle, 📎=attached\n1732\t\n1733\tIdle: Time since content changed (s/m/h)\n1734\t\n1735\tLayout: Auto-columns based on count/width\n1736\t\n1737\tSelf-Update: Press 'u' when update available\n1738\t  Status bar shows \"⬆ vX.X.X available!\"`\n1739\t\t}\n1740\t\n1741\t\t// Create help text panel with wrapping that preserves line breaks\n1742\t\thelpWidth := d.width - panelWidth - 6 // Remaining width for help text\n1743\t\tif helpWidth < 40 {\n1744\t\t\thelpWidth = 40\n1745\t\t}\n1746\t\n1747\t\t// Calculate available lines for help text\n1748\t\t// panelHeight includes borders (2 lines), padding, title (1 line), blank line (1 line)\n1749\t\tavailableLines := panelHeight - 4 // -4 for borders, title, and spacing\n1750\t\tif availableLines < 5 {\n1751\t\t\tavailableLines = 5\n1752\t\t}\n1753\t\n1754\t\t// Wrap the help text\n1755\t\twrappedHelp := wrapTextPreserveBreaks(helpText, helpWidth-4)\n1756\t\thelpLines := strings.Split(wrappedHelp, \"\\n\")\n1757\t\n1758\t\t// Check if we need 2-column layout\n1759\t\tvar finalHelpText string\n1760\t\tif len(helpLines) > availableLines {\n1761\t\t\t// Use 2-column layout to fit more content\n1762\t\t\tcolumnWidth := (helpWidth - 6) / 2 // Split into 2 columns with spacing\n1763\t\n1764\t\t\t// Re-wrap text to narrower column width first\n1765\t\t\twrappedForColumns := wrapTextPreserveBreaks(helpText, columnWidth-2)\n1766\t\t\tcolumnLines := strings.Split(wrappedForColumns, \"\\n\")\n1767\t\n1768\t\t\t// Split lines into two columns at midpoint\n1769\t\t\tmidPoint := (len(columnLines) + 1) / 2\n1770\t\n1771\t\t\t// Ensure we don't exceed available lines\n1772\t\t\tif midPoint > availableLines {\n1773\t\t\t\tmidPoint = availableLines\n1774\t\t\t}\n1775\t\n1776\t\t\tleftLines := columnLines[:midPoint]\n1777\t\t\tvar rightLines []string\n1778\t\t\tif midPoint < len(columnLines) {\n1779\t\t\t\tendPoint := midPoint * 2\n1780\t\t\t\tif endPoint > len(columnLines) {\n1781\t\t\t\t\tendPoint = len(columnLines)\n1782\t\t\t\t}\n1783\t\t\t\trightLines = columnLines[midPoint:endPoint]\n1784\t\t\t}\n1785\t\n1786\t\t\t// Pad shorter column with empty lines for alignment\n1787\t\t\tfor len(rightLines) < len(leftLines) {\n1788\t\t\t\trightLines = append(rightLines, \"\")\n1789\t\t\t}\n1790\t\n1791\t\t\t// Ensure both columns fit within available lines\n1792\t\t\tif len(leftLines) > availableLines {\n1793\t\t\t\tleftLines = leftLines[:availableLines]\n1794\t\t\t\trightLines = rightLines[:availableLines]\n1795\t\t\t}\n1796\t\n1797\t\t\t// Build columns with fixed width\n1798\t\t\tvar leftCol, rightCol strings.Builder\n1799\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < len(leftLines); i++ {\n1800\t\t\t\tif i > 0 {\n1801\t\t\t\t\tleftCol.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n1802\t\t\t\t\trightCol.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n1803\t\t\t\t}\n1804\t\t\t\tleftCol.WriteString(leftLines[i])\n1805\t\t\t\tif i < len(rightLines) {\n1806\t\t\t\t\trightCol.WriteString(rightLines[i])\n1807\t\t\t\t}\n1808\t\t\t}\n1809\t\n1810\t\t\tleftColPanel := lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(columnWidth).Render(leftCol.String())\n1811\t\t\trightColPanel := lipgloss.NewStyle().Width(columnWidth).Render(rightCol.String())\n1812\t\n1813\t\t\tfinalHelpText = lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Top, leftColPanel, \"  \", rightColPanel)\n1814\t\t} else {\n1815\t\t\t// Single column is fine\n1816\t\t\tfinalHelpText = strings.Join(helpLines, \"\\n\")\n1817\t\t}\n1818\t\n1819\t\thelpPanel := lipgloss.NewStyle().\n1820\t\t\tBorderStyle(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).\n1821\t\t\tBorderForeground(lipgloss.Color(\"#ffaa00\")). // Orange for help\n1822\t\t\tPadding(0, 1).\n1823\t\t\tWidth(helpWidth).\n1824\t\t\tHeight(panelHeight).\n1825\t\t\tRender(successStyle.Render(title) + \"\\n\\n\" + finalHelpText)\n1826\t\n1827\t\t// Render panel on left, help on right\n1828\t\treturn lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Top, panel, \" \", helpPanel)\n1829\t}\n1830\t\n1831\t// renderStatusBar renders the status bar at the bottom of the view.\n1832\t//\n1833\t// Wide/ultrawide (≥120 cols): single line —\n1834\t//   time+version  |  repo link or update notice  |  dimensions+shortcuts\n1835\t//\n1836\t// Compact (<120 cols): two lines —\n1837\t//   Line 1: repo link (always) or update notice\n1838\t//   Line 2: time+version on the left, dimensions+shortcuts on the right\n1839\tfunc (d *Dashboard) renderStatusBar() string {\n1840\t\tleft := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s %s\", d.lastUpdate.Format(\"15:04:05\"), d.version)\n1841\t\n1842\t\tshortcuts := \"l:lookback h:help q:quit r:refresh\"\n1843\t\tif d.updateInfo != nil && d.updateInfo.UpdateAvailable && !d.updating {\n1844\t\t\tshortcuts = \"u:update l:lookback h:help q:quit r:refresh\"\n1845\t\t}\n1846\t\tright := fmt.Sprintf(\"%dx%d %s\", d.width, d.height, shortcuts)\n1847\t\n1848\t\t// Build the repo/update middle string\n1849\t\tvar middle string\n1850\t\tif d.updating {\n1851\t\t\tmiddle = warningStyle.Render(d.updateStatus)\n1852\t\t} else if d.updateStatus != \"\" {\n1853\t\t\tmiddle = errorStyle.Render(d.updateStatus)\n1854\t\t} else if d.updateInfo != nil && d.updateInfo.UpdateAvailable {\n1855\t\t\tmiddle = successStyle.Render(fmt.Sprintf(\"⬆ %s available! Press u to update\", d.updateInfo.LatestVersion))\n1856\t\t} else {\n1857\t\t\tmiddle = dimStyle.Render(\"https://github.com/jedarden/ccdash\")\n1858\t\t}\n1859\t\n1860\t\tif d.layoutMode != LayoutCompact {\n1861\t\t\t// Wide / ultrawide: single line with repo link centred between left and right\n1862\t\t\ttotalContent := lipgloss.Width(left) + lipgloss.Width(middle) + 6\n\tpanelHeight := d.height - 3 // -2 borders, -1 status line\n\n\t// Step 1: System panel gets fixed width for CPU bars\n\tsystemWidth := 60\n\tif totalPanelWidth < 180 {\n\t\tsystemWidth = 55\n\t}\n\n\t// Step 2: Calculate minimum and ideal widths for both panels\n\tminTokenWidth := 46\n\tminTmuxWidth := d.calculateTmuxPanelWidth(panelHeight)\n\n\t// Ideal token width: side-by-side layout with comfortable model display\n\t// Left column (22) + separator (2) + right column for models\n\t// Right column needs: model name (up to 15) + cost (8) + tokens (12) = ~35\n\t// Total ideal: 22 + 2 + 35 + 4 (borders) = 60\n\tidealTokenWidth := 60\n\n\t// Ideal tmux width: minimum cell width + some padding for session names\n\t// Use 35 chars per cell (28 min + 7 for longer names)\n\tidealCellWidth := 35\n\ttmuxCols := d.getTmuxColumnCount(panelHeight)\n\tidealTmuxWidth := tmuxCols*idealCellWidth + (tmuxCols - 1) + 4\n\n\t// Available space after system panel\n\tavailableWidth := totalPanelWidth - systemWidth\n\n\t// Start with minimums\n\ttokenWidth := minTokenWidth\n\ttmuxWidth := minTmuxWidth\n\n\t// Calculate how much each panel wants beyond minimum\n\ttokenWant := idealTokenWidth - minTokenWidth\n\tif tokenWant < 0 {\n\t\ttokenWant = 0\n\t}\n\ttmuxWant := idealTmuxWidth - minTmuxWidth\n\tif tmuxWant < 0 {\n\t\ttmuxWant = 0\n\t}\n\n\t// Distribute remaining space proportionally based on wants\n\tremainingAfterMins := availableWidth - minTokenWidth - minTmuxWidth\n\tif remainingAfterMins > 0 {\n\t\ttotalWant := tokenWant + tmuxWant\n\t\tif totalWant > 0 {\n\t\t\t// Proportional allocation\n\t\t\ttokenExtra := remainingAfterMins * tokenWant / totalWant\n\t\t\ttmuxExtra := remainingAfterMins - tokenExtra\n\t\t\ttokenWidth = minTokenWidth + tokenExtra\n\t\t\ttmuxWidth = minTmuxWidth + tmuxExtra\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// Neither wants more, split evenly\n\t\t\ttokenWidth = minTokenWidth + remainingAfterMins/2\n\t\t\ttmuxWidth = minTmuxWidth + remainingAfterMins - remainingAfterMins/2\n\t\t}\n\t} else if remainingAfterMins < 0 {\n\t\t// Not enough space for both minimums - compress proportionally\n\t\tdeficit := -remainingAfterMins\n\t\ttotalMin := minTokenWidth + minTmuxWidth\n\t\t// Reduce each panel proportionally to its minimum\n\t\ttokenReduction := deficit * minTokenWidth / totalMin\n\t\ttmuxReduction := deficit - tokenReduction\n\t\ttokenWidth = minTokenWidth - tokenReduction\n\t\ttmuxWidth = minTmuxWidth - tmuxReduction\n\t\t// Enforce absolute minimums\n\t\tif tokenWidth < 30 {\n\t\t\ttokenWidth = 30\n\t\t\ttmuxWidth = availableWidth - tokenWidth\n\t\t}\n\t\tif tmuxWidth < 30 {\n\t\t\ttmuxWidth = 30\n\t\t\ttokenWidth = availableWidth - tmuxWidth\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Cap token panel - it doesn't need more than ideal\n\tif tokenWidth > idealTokenWidth {\n\t\texcess := tokenWidth - idealTokenWidth\n\t\ttokenWidth = idealTokenWidth\n\t\ttmuxWidth += excess\n\t}\n\n\t// Final safety: ensure widths are positive\n\tif tokenWidth < 1 {\n\t\ttokenWidth = 1\n\t}\n\tif tmuxWidth < 1 {\n\t\ttmuxWidth = 1\n\t}\n\n\tsystemPanel := d.renderSystemPanel(systemWidth, panelHeight)\n\ttokenPanel := d.renderTokenPanel(tokenWidth, panelHeight)\n\ttmuxPanel := d.renderTmuxPanel(tmuxWidth, panelHeight)\n\n\t// Force all panels to exactly the same height using lipgloss\n\t// This ensures borders align even if content varies\n\tuniformHeight := lipgloss.NewStyle().Height(panelHeight)\n\tsystemPanel = uniformHeight.Render(systemPanel)\n\ttokenPanel = uniformHeight.Render(tokenPanel)\n\ttmuxPanel = uniformHeight.Render(tmuxPanel)\n\n\t// Join horizontally with top alignment\n\treturn lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Top,\n\t\tsystemPanel,\n\t\ttokenPanel,\n\t\ttmuxPanel,\n\t)\n}\n\n// renderWide renders 2 panels on top, 1 on bottom\nfunc (d *Dashboard) renderWide() string {\n\tpanelWidth := (d.width - 3) / 2 // 2 panels with spacing\n\ttopHeight := (d.height - 4) / 2 // Split height\n\tbottomHeight := d.height - topHeight - 4\n\n\tsystemPanel := d.renderSystemPanel(panelWidth, topHeight)\n\ttokenPanel := d.renderTokenPanel(panelWidth, topHeight)\n\ttmuxPanel := d.renderTmuxPanel(d.width-2, bottomHeight)\n\n\ttopRow := lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Top, systemPanel, \" \", tokenPanel)\n\n\treturn lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left, topRow, tmuxPanel)\n}\n\n// renderNarrow renders panels stacked vertically\nfunc (d *Dashboard) renderNarrow() string {\n\tpanelWidth := d.width - 2\n\tpanelHeight := (d.height - 5) / 3 // 3 panels stacked\n\n\tsystemPanel := d.renderSystemPanel(panelWidth, panelHeight)\n\ttokenPanel := d.renderTokenPanel(panelWidth, panelHeight)\n\ttmuxPanel := d.renderTmuxPanel(panelWidth, panelHeight)\n\n\treturn lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left,\n\t\tsystemPanel,\n\t\ttokenPanel,\n\t\ttmuxPanel,\n\t)\n}\n\n// renderCompact renders panels stacked vertically for narrow terminals (e.g. 75x68):\n// tmux sessions on top, token usage in the middle, system resources on the bottom.\n// Height is distributed with tmux getting extra rows since session lists are tall.\nfunc (d *Dashboard) renderCompact() string {","numLines":150,"startLine":636,"totalLines":2129}}}

{\n311\t\t\tdiv *= unit\n312\t\t\texp++\n313\t\t}\n314\t\n315\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.2f %s\", float64(bytes)/float64(div), units[exp])\n316\t}\n317\t\n318\t// FormatRate formats bytes per second as collects memory usage metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectMemory() MemoryMetrics {\n\tmemMetrics := MemoryMetrics{}\n\n\tvmem, err := mem.VirtualMemory()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tmemMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect memory metrics: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn memMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tmemMetrics.Used = vmem.Used\n\tmemMetrics.Total = vmem.Total\n\tmemMetrics.Percentage = vmem.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn memMetrics\n}\n\n// collectSwap collects swap usage metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectSwap() SwapMetrics {\n\tswapMetrics := SwapMetrics{}\n\n\tswap, err := mem.SwapMemory()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tswapMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect swap metrics: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn swapMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tswapMetrics.Used = swap.Used\n\tswapMetrics.Total = swap.Total\n\tswapMetrics.Percentage = swap.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn swapMetrics\n}\n\n// collectDiskUsage collects disk space usage metrics for root filesystem\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectDiskUsage() DiskUsageMetrics {\n\tdiskMetrics := DiskUsageMetrics{\n\t\tPath: \"/\", // Monitor root filesystem\n\t}\n\n\tusage, err := disk.Usage(\"/\")\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tdiskMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect disk usage: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn diskMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tdiskMetrics.Used = usage.Used\n\tdiskMetrics.Total = usage.Total\n\tdiskMetrics.Free = usage.Free\n\tdiskMetrics.Percentage = usage.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn diskMetrics\n}\n\n// collectDiskIO collects disk I/O rate metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectDiskIO() DiskIOMetrics {\n\tioMetrics := DiskIOMetrics{}\n\n\t// Get current I/O counters\n\tioCounters, err := disk.IOCounters()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tioMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect disk I/O: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn ioMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tduration := now.Sub(sc.prevIOTime).Seconds()\n\n\t// Calculate rates if we have previous data\n\tif len(sc.prevIOCounters) > 0 && duration > 0 {\n\t\tvar totalReadBytes, totalWriteBytes uint64\n\n\t\tfor name, current := range ioCounters {\n\t\t\tif prev, exists := sc.prevIOCounters[name]; exists {\n\t\t\t\ttotalReadBytes += current.ReadBytes - prev.ReadBytes\n\t\t\t\ttotalWriteBytes += current.WriteBytes - prev.WriteBytes\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tioMetrics.ReadBytesPerSec = float64(totalReadBytes) / duration\n\t\tioMetrics.WriteBytesPerSec = float64(totalWriteBytes) / duration\n\t}\n\n\t// Store current counters for next collection\n\tsc.prevIOCounters = ioCounters\n\tsc.prevIOTime = now\n\n\treturn ioMetrics\n}\n\n// collectNetIO collects network I/O rate metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectNetIO() NetIOMetrics {\n\tnetMetrics := NetIOMetrics{}\n\n\t// Get current network I/O counters\n\tnetCounters, err := net.IOCounters(false) // false = aggregate all interfaces\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tnetMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect network I/O: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn netMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tif len(netCounters) == 0 {\n\t\tnetMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"no network interfaces found\")\n\t\treturn netMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tduration := now.Sub(sc.prevNetTime).Seconds()\n\n\t// Calculate rates if we have previous data\n\tif len(sc.prevNetCounters) > 0 && duration > 0 {\n\t\t// Use aggregate stats (first element when pernic=false)\n\t\tcurrent := netCounters[0]\n\t\tprev := sc.prevNetCounters[0]\n\n\t\trecvBytes := current.BytesRecv - prev.BytesRecv\n\t\tsentBytes := current.BytesSent - prev.BytesSent\n\n\t\tnetMetrics.RecvBytesPerSec = float64(recvBytes) / duration\n\t\tnetMetrics.SentBytesPerSec = float64(sentBytes) / duration\n\t}\n\n\t// Store current counters for next collection\n\tsc.prevNetCounters = netCounters\n\tsc.prevNetTime = now\n\n\treturn netMetrics\n}\n\n// FormatBytes formats bytes as human-readable string (KB/MB/GB/TB)\nfunc FormatBytes(bytes uint64) string {\n\tconst unit = 1024\n\tif bytes < unit {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%d B\", bytes)\n\t}\n\n\tunits := []string{\"KB\", \"MB\", \"GB\", \"TB\", \"PB\"}\n\tdiv, exp := uint64(unit), 0\n\tfor n := bytes / unit; n >= unit && exp < len(units)-1; n /= unit {\n\t\tdiv *= unit\n\t\texp++\n\t}\n\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.2f %s\", float64(bytes)/float64(div), units[exp])\n}\n\n// FormatRate formats bytes per second as human-readable rate (KB/s, MB/s, GB/s)\nfunc FormatRate(bytesPerSec float64) string {\n\tconst unit = 1024.0\n\tif bytesPerSec < unit {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.2f B/s\", bytesPerSec)\n\t}\n\n\tunits := []string{\"KB/s\", \"MB/s\", \"GB/s\", \"TB/s\", \"PB/s\"}\n\tdiv, exp := unit, 0\n\tfor n := bytesPerSec / unit; n >= unit && exp < len(units)-1; n /= unit {\n\t\tdiv *= unit\n\t\texp++\n\t}\n\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.2f %s\", bytesPerSec/div, units[exp])\n}\n","numLines":334,"startLine":1,"totalLines":334}}}

SystemMetrics holds all collected system metrics with timestamp\ntype SystemMetrics struct {\n\tCPU        CPUMetrics\n\tLoad       LoadMetrics\n\tMemory     MemoryMetrics\n\tSwap       SwapMetrics\n\tDiskUsage  DiskUsageMetrics\n\tDiskIO     DiskIOMetrics\n\tNetIO      NetIOMetrics\n\tLastUpdate time.Time\n}\n\n// CPUMetrics holds CPU usage information\ntype CPUMetrics struct {\n\tTotalPercent float64\n\tPerCore      []float64\n\tError        error\n}\n\n// LoadMetrics holds system load averages\ntype LoadMetrics struct {\n\tLoad1  float64\n\tLoad5  float64\n\tLoad15 network I/O rate information\ntype NetIOMetrics struct {\n\tRecvBytesPerSec float64\n\tSentBytesPerSec float64\n\tError           error\n}\n\n// SystemCollector collects system metrics\ntype SystemCollector struct {\n\t// Previous disk I/O counters for rate calculation\n\tprevIOCounters map[string]disk.IOCountersStat\n\tprevIOTime     time.Time\n\t// Previous network I/O counters for rate calculation\n\tprevNetCounters []net.IOCountersStat\n\tprevNetTime     time.Time\n}\n\n// NewSystemCollector creates a new SystemCollector instance\nfunc NewSystemCollector() *SystemCollector {\n\treturn &SystemCollector{\n\t\tprevIOCounters: make(map[string]disk.IOCountersStat),\n\t\tprevIOTime:     time.Now(),\n\t}\n}\n\n// Collect gathers all system metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) Collect() SystemMetrics {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\n\tmetrics := SystemMetrics{\n\t\tLastUpdate: now,\n\t}\n\n\t// Collect CPU metrics\n\tmetrics.CPU = sc.collectCPU()\n\n\t// Collect load averages\n\tmetrics.Load = sc.collectLoad()\n\n\t// Collect memory metrics\n\tmetrics.Memory = sc.collectMemory()\n\n\t// Collect swap metrics\n\tmetrics.Swap = sc.collectSwap()\n\n\t// Collect disk usage metrics\n\tmetrics.DiskUsage = sc.collectDiskUsage()\n\n\t// Collect disk I/O metrics\n\tmetrics.DiskIO = sc.collectDiskIO()\n\n\t// Collect network I/O metrics\n\tmetrics.NetIO = sc.collectNetIO()\n\n\treturn metrics\n}\n\n// collectCPU collects CPU usage metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectCPU() CPUMetrics {\n\tcpuMetrics := CPUMetrics{}\n\n\t// Get per-core CPU percentages (1 second interval)\n\tperCore, err := cpu.Percent(time.Second, true)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tcpuMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect per-core CPU: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn cpuMetrics\n\t}\n\tcpuMetrics.PerCore = perCore\n\n\t// Calculate total CPU percentage as average of all cores\n\tif len(perCore) > 0 {\n\t\tvar sum float64\n\t\tfor _, pct := range perCore {\n\t\t\tsum += pct\n\t\t}\n\t\tcpuMetrics.TotalPercent = sum / float64(len(perCore))\n\t}\n\n\treturn cpuMetrics\n}\n\n// collectLoad collects system load averages\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectLoad() LoadMetrics {\n\tloadMetrics := LoadMetrics{}\n\n\tloadAvg, err := load.Avg()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tloadMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect load averages: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn loadMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tloadMetrics.Load1 = loadAvg.Load1\n\tloadMetrics.Load5 = loadAvg.Load5\n\tloadMetrics.Load15 = loadAvg.Load15\n\n\treturn loadMetrics\n}\n\n// collectMemory collects memory usage metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectMemory() MemoryMetrics {\n\tmemMetrics := MemoryMetrics{}\n\n\tvmem, err := mem.VirtualMemory()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tmemMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect memory metrics: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn memMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tmemMetrics.Used = vmem.Used\n\tmemMetrics.Total = vmem.Total\n\tmemMetrics.Percentage = vmem.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn memMetrics\n}\n\n// collectSwap collects swap usage metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectSwap() SwapMetrics {\n\tswapMetrics := SwapMetrics{}\n\n\tswap, err := mem.SwapMemory()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tswapMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect swap metrics: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn swapMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tswapMetrics.Used = swap.Used\n\tswapMetrics.Total = swap.Total\n\tswapMetrics.Percentage = swap.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn swapMetrics\n}\n\n// collectDiskUsage collects disk space usage metrics for root filesystem\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectDiskUsage() DiskUsageMetrics {\n\tdiskMetrics := DiskUsageMetrics{\n\t\tPath: \"/\", // Monitor root filesystem\n\t}\n\n\tusage, err := disk.Usage(\"/\")\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tdiskMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect disk usage: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn diskMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tdiskMetrics.Used = usage.Used\n\tdiskMetrics.Total = usage.Total\n\tdiskMetrics.Free = usage.Free\n\tdiskMetrics.Percentage = usage.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn diskMetrics\n}\n\n// collectDiskIO collects disk I/O rate metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectDiskIO() DiskIOMetrics {\n\tioMetrics := DiskIOMetrics{}\n\n\t// Get current I/O counters\n\tioCounters, err := disk.IOCounters()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tioMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect disk I/O: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn ioMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tduration := now.Sub(sc.prevIOTime).Seconds()\n\n\t// Calculate rates if we have previous data\n\tif len(sc.prevIOCounters) > 0 && duration > 0 {\n\t\tvar totalReadBytes, totalWriteBytes uint64\n\n\t\tfor name, current := range ioCounters {\n\t\t\tif prev, exists := sc.prevIOCounters[name]; exists {\n\t\t\t\ttotalReadBytes += current.ReadBytes - prev.ReadBytes\n\t\t\t\ttotalWriteBytes += current.WriteBytes - prev.WriteBytes\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tioMetrics.ReadBytesPerSec = float64(totalReadBytes) / duration\n\t\tioMetrics.WriteBytesPerSec = float64(totalWriteBytes) / duration\n\t}\n\n\t// Store current counters for next collection\n\tsc.prevIOCounters = ioCounters\n\tsc.prevIOTime = collectLoad() LoadMetrics {\n\tloadMetrics := LoadMetrics{}\n\n\tloadAvg, err := load.Avg()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tloadMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect load averages: %w\", SwapMetrics{}\n\n\tswap, err := mem.SwapMemory()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tswapMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect swap metrics: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn swapMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tswapMetrics.Used duration\n\t\tioMetrics.WriteBytesPerSec = float64(totalWriteBytes) / duration\n\t}\n\n\t// Store current counters for next collection\n\tsc.prevIOCounters = ioCounters\n\tsc.prevIOTime = now\n\n\treturn ioMetrics\n}\n\n// collectNetIO collects network I/O rate metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectNetIO() NetIOMetrics {\n\tnetMetrics := NetIOMetrics{}\n\n\t// Get current network
