error\n}\n\n// DiskIOMetrics holds disk I/O rate information\ntype DiskIOMetrics struct {\n\tReadBytesPerSec  float64\n\tWriteBytesPerSec float64\n\tError            error\n}\n\n// NetInterfaceMetrics holds stats for a single network interface\ntype NetInterfaceMetrics struct {\n\tName            string\n\tRecvBytesPerSec float64\n\tSentBytesPerSec float64\n\tTotalRecvBytes  uint64\n\tTotalSentBytes  uint64\n}\n\n// NetIOMetrics holds network I/O rate information\ntype NetIOMetrics struct {\n\tRecvBytesPerSec float64                  // Aggregate receive rate\n\tSentBytesPerSec float64                  // Aggregate send rate\n\tInterfaces      []NetInterfaceMetrics    // Per-interface stats\n\tError           error\n}\n\n// SystemCollector collects system metrics\ntype SystemCollector struct {\n\t// Previous disk I/O counters for rate calculation\n\tprevIOCounters map[string]disk.IOCountersStat\n\tprevIOTime     time.Time\n\t// Previous network I/O counters for rate calculation\n\tprevNetCounters map[string]net.IOCountersStat\n\tprevNetTime     time.Time\n}\n\n// NewSystemCollector creates a new SystemCollector instance\nfunc NewSystemCollector() *SystemCollector {\n\treturn &SystemCollector{\n\t\tprevIOCounters: make(map[string]disk.IOCountersStat),\n\t\tprevIOTime:     time.Now(),\n\t}\n}\n\n// Collect gathers all system metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) Collect() SystemMetrics {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\n\tmetrics := SystemMetrics{\n\t\tLastUpdate: now,\n\t}\n\n\t// Collect CPU metrics\n\tmetrics.CPU = sc.collectCPU()\n\n\t// Collect load averages\n\tmetrics.Load = sc.collectLoad()\n\n\t// Collect memory metrics\n\tmetrics.Memory = sc.collectMemory()\n\n\t// Collect swap metrics\n\tmetrics.Swap = sc.collectSwap()\n\n\t// Collect disk usage metrics\n\tmetrics.DiskUsage = sc.collectDiskUsage()\n\n\t// Collect disk I/O metrics\n\tmetrics.DiskIO = sc.collectDiskIO()\n\n\t// Collect network I/O metrics\n\tmetrics.NetIO = sc.collectNetIO()\n\n\treturn metrics\n}\n\n// collectCPU collects CPU usage metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectCPU() CPUMetrics {\n\tcpuMetrics := CPUMetrics{}\n\n\t// Get per-core CPU percentages (1 second interval)\n\tperCore, err := cpu.Percent(time.Second, true)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tcpuMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect per-core CPU: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn cpuMetrics\n\t}\n\tcpuMetrics.PerCore = perCore\n\n\t// Calculate total CPU percentage as average of all cores\n\tif len(perCore) > 0 {\n\t\tvar sum float64\n\t\tfor _, pct := range perCore {\n\t\t\tsum += pct\n\t\t}\n\t\tcpuMetrics.TotalPercent = sum / float64(len(perCore))\n\t}\n\n\treturn cpuMetrics\n}\n\n// collectLoad collects system load averages\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectLoad() LoadMetrics {\n\tloadMetrics := LoadMetrics{}\n\n\tloadAvg, err := load.Avg()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tloadMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect load averages: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn loadMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tloadMetrics.Load1 = loadAvg.Load1\n\tloadMetrics.Load5 = loadAvg.Load5\n\tloadMetrics.Load15 = loadAvg.Load15\n\n\treturn loadMetrics\n}\n\n// collectMemory collects memory usage metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectMemory() MemoryMetrics {\n\tmemMetrics := MemoryMetrics{}\n\n\tvmem, err := mem.VirtualMemory()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tmemMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect memory metrics: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn memMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tmemMetrics.Used = vmem.Used\n\tmemMetrics.Total = vmem.Total\n\tmemMetrics.Percentage = vmem.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn memMetrics\n}\n\n// collectSwap collects swap usage metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectSwap() SwapMetrics {\n\tswapMetrics := SwapMetrics{}\n\n\tswap, err := mem.SwapMemory()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tswapMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect swap metrics: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn swapMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tswapMetrics.Used = swap.Used\n\tswapMetrics.Total = swap.Total\n\tswapMetrics.Percentage = swap.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn swapMetrics\n}\n\n// collectDiskUsage collects disk space usage metrics for root filesystem\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectDiskUsage() DiskUsageMetrics {\n\tdiskMetrics := DiskUsageMetrics{\n\t\tPath: \"/\", // Monitor root filesystem\n\t}\n\n\tusage, err := disk.Usage(\"/\")\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tdiskMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect disk usage: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn diskMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tdiskMetrics.Used = usage.Used\n\tdiskMetrics.Total = usage.Total\n\tdiskMetrics.Free = usage.Free\n\tdiskMetrics.Percentage = usage.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn diskMetrics\n}\n\n// collectDiskIO collects disk I/O rate metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectDiskIO() DiskIOMetrics {\n\tioMetrics := DiskIOMetrics{}\n\n\t// Get current I/O counters\n\tioCounters, err := disk.IOCounters()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tioMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect disk I/O: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn ioMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tduration := now.Sub(sc.prevIOTime).Seconds()\n\n\t// Calculate rates if we have previous data\n\tif len(sc.prevIOCounters) > 0 && duration > 0 {\n\t\tvar totalReadBytes, totalWriteBytes uint64\n\n\t\tfor name, current := range ioCounters {\n\t\t\tif prev, exists := sc.prevIOCounters[name]; exists {\n\t\t\t\ttotalReadBytes += current.ReadBytes - prev.ReadBytes\n\t\t\t\ttotalWriteBytes += current.WriteBytes - prev.WriteBytes\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tioMetrics.ReadBytesPerSec = float64(totalReadBytes) / duration\n\t\tioMetrics.WriteBytesPerSec = float64(totalWriteBytes) / duration\n\t}\n\n\t// Store current counters for next collection\n\tsc.prevIOCounters = ioCounters\n\tsc.prevIOTime = now\n\n\treturn ioMetrics\n}\n\n// collectNetIO collects network I/O rate metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectNetIO() NetIOMetrics {\n\tnetMetrics := NetIOMetrics{}\n\n\t// Get current network I/O counters\n\tnetCounters, err := net.IOCounters(false) // false = aggregate all interfaces\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tnetMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect network I/O: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn netMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tif len(netCounters) == 0 {\n\t\tnetMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"no network interfaces found\")\n\t\treturn netMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tduration := now.Sub(sc.prevNetTime).Seconds()\n\n\t// Calculate rates if we have previous data\n\tif len(sc.prevNetCounters) > 0 && duration > 0 {\n\t\t// Use aggregate stats (first element when pernic=false)\n\t\tcurrent := netCounters[0]\n\t\tprev := sc.prevNetCounters[0]\n\n\t\trecvBytes := current.BytesRecv - prev.BytesRecv\n\t\tsentBytes := current.BytesSent - prev.BytesSent\n\n\t\tnetMetrics.RecvBytesPerSec = float64(recvBytes) / duration\n\t\tnetMetrics.SentBytesPerSec = float64(sentBytes) / duration\n\t}\n\n\t// Store current counters for next collection\n\tsc.prevNetCounters = netCounters\n\tsc.prevNetTime = now\n\n\treturn netMetrics\n}\n\n// FormatBytes formats bytes as human-readable string (KB/MB/GB/TB)\nfunc FormatBytes(bytes uint64) string {\n\tconst unit = 1024\n\tif bytes < unit {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%d B\", bytes)\n\t}\n\n\tunits := []string{\"KB\", \"MB\", \"GB\", \"TB\", \"PB\"}\n\tdiv, exp := uint64(unit), 0\n\tfor n := bytes / unit; n >= unit && exp < len(units)-1; n /= unit {\n\t\tdiv *= unit\n\t\texp++\n\t}\n\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.2f %s\", float64(bytes)/float64(div), units[exp])\n}\n\n// FormatRate formats bytes per second as human-readable rate (KB/s, MB/s, GB/s)\nfunc FormatRate(bytesPerSec float64) string {\n\tconst unit = 1024.0\n\tif bytesPerSec < unit {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.2f B/s\", bytesPerSec)\n\t}\n\n\tunits := []string{\"KB/s\", \"MB/s\", \"GB/s\", \"TB/s\", \"PB/s\"}\n\tdiv, exp := unit, 0\n\tfor n := bytesPerSec / unit; n >= unit && exp < len(units)-1; n /= unit {\n\t\tdiv *= unit\n\t\texp++\n\t}\n\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%.2f %s\", bytesPerSec/div, units[exp])\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":103,"oldLines":6,"newStart":103,"newLines":8,"lines":["   return &SystemCollector{","     prevIOCounters: make(map[string]disk.IOCountersStat),"," (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/cpu\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/disk\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/load\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/mem\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/net\"\n)\n\n// SystemMetrics holds all collected system metrics with timestamp\ntype SystemMetrics struct {\n\tCPU        CPUMetrics\n\tLoad       LoadMetrics\n\tMemory     MemoryMetrics\n\tSwap       SwapMetrics\n\tDiskUsage  DiskUsageMetrics\n\tDiskIO     DiskIOMetrics\n\tNetIO      NetIOMetrics\n\tLastUpdate time.Time\n}\n\n// CPUMetrics holds CPU usage information\ntype CPUMetrics struct {\n\tTotalPercent float64\n\tPerCore      []float64\n\tError        error\n}\n\n// LoadMetrics holds system load averages\ntype LoadMetrics struct {\n\tLoad1  float64\n\tLoad5  float64\n\tLoad15 float64\n\tError  error\n}\n\n// MemoryMetrics holds memory usage information\ntype MemoryMetrics struct {\n\tUsed       uint64\n\tTotal      uint64\n\tPercentage float64\n\tError      error\n}\n\n// SwapMetrics holds swap usage information\ntype SwapMetrics struct {\n\tUsed       uint64\n\tTotal      uint64\n\tPercentage float64\n\tError      error\n}\n\n// DiskUsageMetrics holds disk space usage information\ntype DiskUsageMetrics struct {\n\tUsed       uint64\n\tTotal      uint64\n\tFree       uint64\n\tPercentage float64\n\tPath       string // Mount point being monitored\n\tError      error\n}\n\n// DiskIOMetrics holds disk I/O rate information\ntype DiskIOMetrics struct {\n\tReadBytesPerSec  float64\n\tWriteBytesPerSec float64\n\tError            error\n}\n\n// NetInterfaceMetrics holds stats for a single network interface\ntype NetInterfaceMetrics struct {\n\tName            string\n\tRecvBytesPerSec float64\n\tSentBytesPerSec float64\n\tTotalRecvBytes  uint64\n\tTotalSentBytes  uint64\n}\n\n// NetIOMetrics holds network I/O rate information\ntype NetIOMetrics struct {\n\tRecvBytesPerSec float64                  // Aggregate receive rate\n\tSentBytesPerSec float64                  // Aggregate send rate\n\tInterfaces      []NetInterfaceMetrics    // Per-interface stats\n\tError           error\n}\n\n// SystemCollector collects system metrics\ntype SystemCollector struct {\n\t// Previous disk I/O counters for rate calculation\n\tprevIOCounters map[string]disk.IOCountersStat\n\tprevIOTime     time.Time\n\t// Previous network I/O counters for rate calculation\n\tprevNetCounters map[string]net.IOCountersStat\n\tprevNetTime     time.Time\n}\n\n// NewSystemCollector creates a new SystemCollector instance\nfunc NewSystemCollector() *SystemCollector {\n\treturn &SystemCollector{\n\t\tprevIOCounters: make(map[string]disk.IOCountersStat),\n\t\tprevIOTime:     time.Now(),\n\t\tprevNetCounters: make(map[string]net.IOCountersStat),\n\t\tprevNetTime:    time.Now(),\n\t}\n}\n\n// Collect gathers all system metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) Collect() SystemMetrics {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\n\tmetrics := SystemMetrics{\n\t\tLastUpdate: now,\n\t}\n\n\t// Collect CPU metrics\n\tmetrics.CPU = sc.collectCPU()\n\n\t// Collect load averages\n\tmetrics.Load = sc.collectLoad()\n\n\t// Collect memory metrics\n\tmetrics.Memory = sc.collectMemory()\n\n\t// Collect swap metrics\n\tmetrics.Swap = sc.collectSwap()\n\n\t// Collect disk usage metrics\n\tmetrics.DiskUsage = sc.collectDiskUsage()\n\n\t// Collect disk I/O metrics\n\tmetrics.DiskIO = sc.collectDiskIO()\n\n\t// Collect network I/O metrics\n\tmetrics.NetIO = sc.collectNetIO()\n\n\treturn metrics\n}\n\n// collectCPU collects CPU usage metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectCPU() CPUMetrics {\n\tcpuMetrics := CPUMetrics{}\n\n\t// Get per-core CPU percentages (1 second interval)\n\tperCore, err := cpu.Percent(time.Second, true)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tcpuMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect per-core CPU: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn cpuMetrics\n\t}\n\tcpuMetrics.PerCore = perCore\n\n\t// Calculate total CPU percentage as average of all cores\n\tif len(perCore) > 0 {\n\t\tvar sum float64\n\t\tfor _, pct := range perCore {\n\t\t\tsum += pct\n\t\t}\n\t\tcpuMetrics.TotalPercent = sum / float64(len(perCore))\n\t}\n\n\treturn cpuMetrics\n}\n\n// collectLoad collects system load averages\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectLoad() LoadMetrics {\n\tloadMetrics := LoadMetrics{}\n\n\tloadAvg, err := load.Avg()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tloadMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect load averages: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn loadMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tloadMetrics.Load1 = loadAvg.Load1\n\tloadMetrics.Load5 = loadAvg.Load5\n\tloadMetrics.Load15 = loadAvg.Load15\n\n\treturn loadMetrics\n}\n\n// collectMemory collects memory usage metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectMemory() MemoryMetrics {\n\tmemMetrics := MemoryMetrics{}\n\n\tvmem, err := mem.VirtualMemory()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tmemMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect memory metrics: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn memMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tmemMetrics.Used = vmem.Used\n\tmemMetrics.Total = vmem.Total\n\tmemMetrics.Percentage = vmem.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn memMetrics\n}\n\n// collectSwap collects swap usage metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectSwap() SwapMetrics {\n\tswapMetrics := SwapMetrics{}\n\n\tswap, err := mem.SwapMemory()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tswapMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect swap metrics: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn swapMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tswapMetrics.Used = swap.Used\n\tswapMetrics.Total = swap.Total\n\tswapMetrics.Percentage = swap.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn swapMetrics\n}\n\n// collectDiskUsage collects disk space usage metrics for root filesystem\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectDiskUsage() DiskUsageMetrics {\n\tdiskMetrics := DiskUsageMetrics{\n\t\tPath: \"/\", // Monitor root filesystem\n\t}\n\n\tusage, err := disk.Usage(\"/\")\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tdiskMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect disk usage: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn diskMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tdiskMetrics.Used = usage.Used\n\tdiskMetrics.Total = usage.Total\n\tdiskMetrics.Free = usage.Free\n\tdiskMetrics.Percentage = usage.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn diskMetrics\n}\n\n// collectDiskIO collects disk I/O rate metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectDiskIO() DiskIOMetrics {\n\tioMetrics := DiskIOMetrics{}\n\n\t// Get current I/O counters\n\tioCounters, err := disk.IOCounters()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tioMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect disk I/O: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn ioMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tduration := now.Sub(sc.prevIOTime).Seconds()\n\n\t// Calculate rates if we have previous data\n\tif len(sc.prevIOCounters) > 0 && duration > 0 {\n\t\tvar totalReadBytes, totalWriteBytes uint64\n\n\t\tfor name, current := range ioCounters {\n\t\t\tif prev, exists := sc.prevIOCounters[name]; exists {\n\t\t\t\ttotalReadBytes += current.ReadBytes - prev.ReadBytes\n\t\t\t\ttotalWriteBytes += current.WriteBytes - prev.WriteBytes\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tioMetrics.ReadBytesPerSec = float64(totalReadBytes) / duration\n\t\tioMetrics.WriteBytesPerSec = float64(totalWriteBytes) / duration\n\t}\n\n\t// Store current counters for next collection\n\tsc.prevIOCounters = ioCounters\n\tsc.prevIOTime = now\n\n\treturn ioMetrics\n}\n\n// collectNetIO collects network I/O rate metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectNetIO() NetIOMetrics {\n\tnetMetrics := NetIOMetrics{}\n\n\t// Get current network I/O counters\n\tnetCounters, err := net.IOCounters(false) // false = aggregate all interfaces\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tnetMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect network I/O: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn netMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tif len(netCounters) == 0 {\n\t\tnetMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"no network interfaces found\")\n\t\treturn netMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tduration := now.Sub(sc.prevNetTime).Seconds()\n\n\t// Calculate rates if we have previous data\n\tif len(sc.prevNetCounters) > 0 && duration > 0 {\n\t\t// Use aggregate stats (first element when pernic=false)\n\t\tcurrent := netCounters[0]\n\t\tprev := sc.prevNetCounters[0]\n\n\t\trecvBytes := current.BytesRecv - prev.BytesRecv\n\t\tsentBytes := current.BytesSent - (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/cpu\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/disk\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/load\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/mem\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/net\"\n)","newString":"package (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/cpu\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/disk\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/load\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/mem\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/net\"\n)","originalFile":"package metrics\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/cpu\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/disk\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/load\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/mem\"\n\t\"github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3/net\"\n)\n\n// SystemMetrics holds all collected system metrics with timestamp\ntype SystemMetrics struct {\n\tCPU        CPUMetrics\n\tLoad       LoadMetrics\n\tMemory     MemoryMetrics\n\tSwap       SwapMetrics\n\tDiskUsage  DiskUsageMetrics\n\tDiskIO     DiskIOMetrics\n\tNetIO      NetIOMetrics\n\tLastUpdate time.Time\n}\n\n// CPUMetrics holds CPU usage information\ntype CPUMetrics struct {\n\tTotalPercent float64\n\tPerCore      []float64\n\tError        error\n}\n\n// LoadMetrics holds system load averages\ntype LoadMetrics struct {\n\tLoad1  float64\n\tLoad5  float64\n\tLoad15 float64\n\tError  error\n}\n\n// MemoryMetrics holds memory usage information\ntype MemoryMetrics struct {\n\tUsed       uint64\n\tTotal      uint64\n\tPercentage float64\n\tError      error\n}\n\n// SwapMetrics holds swap usage information\ntype SwapMetrics struct {\n\tUsed       uint64\n\tTotal      uint64\n\tPercentage float64\n\tError      error\n}\n\n// DiskUsageMetrics holds disk space usage information\ntype DiskUsageMetrics struct {\n\tUsed       uint64\n\tTotal      uint64\n\tFree       uint64\n\tPercentage float64\n\tPath       string // Mount point being monitored\n\tError      error\n}\n\n// DiskIOMetrics holds disk I/O rate information\ntype DiskIOMetrics struct {\n\tReadBytesPerSec  float64\n\tWriteBytesPerSec float64\n\tError            error\n}\n\n// NetInterfaceMetrics holds stats for a single network interface\ntype NetInterfaceMetrics struct {\n\tName            string\n\tRecvBytesPerSec float64\n\tSentBytesPerSec float64\n\tTotalRecvBytes  uint64\n\tTotalSentBytes  uint64\n}\n\n// NetIOMetrics holds network I/O rate information\ntype NetIOMetrics struct {\n\tRecvBytesPerSec float64                  // Aggregate receive rate\n\tSentBytesPerSec float64                  // Aggregate send rate\n\tInterfaces      []NetInterfaceMetrics    // Per-interface stats\n\tError           error\n}\n\n// SystemCollector collects system metrics\ntype SystemCollector struct {\n\t// Previous disk I/O counters for rate calculation\n\tprevIOCounters map[string]disk.IOCountersStat\n\tprevIOTime     time.Time\n\t// Previous network I/O counters for rate calculation\n\tprevNetCounters map[string]net.IOCountersStat\n\tprevNetTime     time.Time\n}\n\n// NewSystemCollector creates a new SystemCollector instance\nfunc NewSystemCollector() *SystemCollector {\n\treturn &SystemCollector{\n\t\tprevIOCounters: make(map[string]disk.IOCountersStat),\n\t\tprevIOTime:     time.Now(),\n\t\tprevNetCounters: make(map[string]net.IOCountersStat),\n\t\tprevNetTime:    time.Now(),\n\t}\n}\n\n// Collect gathers all system metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) Collect() SystemMetrics {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\n\tmetrics := SystemMetrics{\n\t\tLastUpdate: now,\n\t}\n\n\t// Collect CPU metrics\n\tmetrics.CPU = sc.collectCPU()\n\n\t// Collect load averages\n\tmetrics.Load = sc.collectLoad()\n\n\t// Collect memory metrics\n\tmetrics.Memory = sc.collectMemory()\n\n\t// Collect swap metrics\n\tmetrics.Swap = sc.collectSwap()\n\n\t// Collect disk usage metrics\n\tmetrics.DiskUsage = sc.collectDiskUsage()\n\n\t// Collect disk I/O metrics\n\tmetrics.DiskIO = sc.collectDiskIO()\n\n\t// Collect network I/O metrics\n\tmetrics.NetIO = sc.collectNetIO()\n\n\treturn metrics\n}\n\n// collectCPU collects CPU usage metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectCPU() CPUMetrics {\n\tcpuMetrics := CPUMetrics{}\n\n\t// Get per-core CPU percentages (1 second interval)\n\tperCore, err := cpu.Percent(time.Second, true)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tcpuMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect per-core CPU: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn cpuMetrics\n\t}\n\tcpuMetrics.PerCore = perCore\n\n\t// Calculate total CPU percentage as average of all cores\n\tif len(perCore) > 0 {\n\t\tvar sum float64\n\t\tfor _, pct := range perCore {\n\t\t\tsum += pct\n\t\t}\n\t\tcpuMetrics.TotalPercent = sum / float64(len(perCore))\n\t}\n\n\treturn cpuMetrics\n}\n\n// collectLoad collects system load averages\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectLoad() LoadMetrics {\n\tloadMetrics := LoadMetrics{}\n\n\tloadAvg, err := load.Avg()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tloadMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect load averages: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn loadMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tloadMetrics.Load1 = loadAvg.Load1\n\tloadMetrics.Load5 = loadAvg.Load5\n\tloadMetrics.Load15 = loadAvg.Load15\n\n\treturn loadMetrics\n}\n\n// collectMemory collects memory usage metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectMemory() MemoryMetrics {\n\tmemMetrics := MemoryMetrics{}\n\n\tvmem, err := mem.VirtualMemory()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tmemMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect memory metrics: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn memMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tmemMetrics.Used = vmem.Used\n\tmemMetrics.Total = vmem.Total\n\tmemMetrics.Percentage = vmem.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn memMetrics\n}\n\n// collectSwap collects swap usage metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectSwap() SwapMetrics {\n\tswapMetrics := SwapMetrics{}\n\n\tswap, err := mem.SwapMemory()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tswapMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect swap metrics: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn swapMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tswapMetrics.Used = swap.Used\n\tswapMetrics.Total = swap.Total\n\tswapMetrics.Percentage = swap.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn swapMetrics\n}\n\n// collectDiskUsage collects disk space usage metrics for root filesystem\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectDiskUsage() DiskUsageMetrics {\n\tdiskMetrics := DiskUsageMetrics{\n\t\tPath: \"/\", // Monitor root filesystem\n\t}\n\n\tusage, err := disk.Usage(\"/\")\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tdiskMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect disk usage: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn diskMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tdiskMetrics.Used = usage.Used\n\tdiskMetrics.Total = usage.Total\n\tdiskMetrics.Free = usage.Free\n\tdiskMetrics.Percentage = usage.UsedPercent\n\n\treturn diskMetrics\n}\n\n// collectDiskIO collects disk I/O rate metrics\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectDiskIO() DiskIOMetrics {\n\tioMetrics := DiskIOMetrics{}\n\n\t// Get current I/O counters\n\tioCounters, err := disk.IOCounters()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tioMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect disk I/O: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn ioMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tduration := now.Sub(sc.prevIOTime).Seconds()\n\n\t// Calculate rates if we have previous data\n\tif len(sc.prevIOCounters) > 0 && duration > 0 {\n\t\tvar totalReadBytes, totalWriteBytes uint64\n\n\t\tfor name, current := range ioCounters {\n\t\t\tif prev, exists := sc.prevIOCounters[name]; exists {\n\t\t\t\ttotalReadBytes += current.ReadBytes - prev.ReadBytes\n\t\t\t\ttotalWriteBytes += current.WriteBytes - prev.WriteBytes\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tioMetrics.ReadBytesPerSec = float64(totalReadBytes) / duration\n\t\tioMetrics.WriteBytesPerSec = float64(totalWriteBytes) / duration\n\t}\n\n\t// Store current counters for next collection\n\tsc.prevIOCounters = ioCounters\n\tsc.prevIOTime = now\n\n\treturn ioMetrics\n}\n\n// collectNetIO collects network I/O rate metrics with per-interface breakdown\nfunc (sc *SystemCollector) collectNetIO() NetIOMetrics {\n\tnetMetrics := NetIOMetrics{\n\t\tInterfaces: make([]NetInterfaceMetrics, 0),\n\t}\n\n\t// Get current network I/O counters per interface\n\tnetCounters, err := net.IOCounters(true) // true = per-interface\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tnetMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"failed to collect network I/O: %w\", err)\n\t\treturn netMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tif len(netCounters) == 0 {\n\t\tnetMetrics.Error = fmt.Errorf(\"no network interfaces found\")\n\t\treturn netMetrics\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tduration := now.Sub(sc.prevNetTime).Seconds()\n\n\t// Interfaces to skip (virtual, local-only, or container interfaces)\n\tskipInterfaces := map[string]bool{\n\t\t\"lo\": true, \"docker0\": true, \"virbr0\": true, \"br-\": true,\n\t\t\"veth\": true, \"tun\": true, \"tap\": true,\n\t}\n\n\tvar totalRecvRate, totalSentRate float64\n\n\tfor _, current := range netCounters {\n\t\t// Skip virtual/local-only interfaces\n\t\tif _, shouldSkip := skipInterfaces[current.Name]; shouldSkip {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Also skip interfaces starting with known prefixes\n\t\tif strings.HasPrefix(current.Name, \"veth\") ||\n\t\t\tstrings.HasPrefix(current.Name, \"docker\") ||\n\t\t\tstrings.HasPrefix(current.Name, \"virbr\") ||\n\t\t\tstrings.HasPrefix(current.Name, \"br-\") ||\n\t\t\tstrings.HasPrefix(current.Name, \"tun\") ||\n\t\t\tstrings.HasPrefix(current.Name, \"tap\") {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tifaceMetrics := NetInterfaceMetrics{\n\t\t\tName:           current.Name,\n\t\t\tTotalRecvBytes: current.BytesRecv,\n\t\t\tTotalSentBytes: current.BytesSent,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Calculate rate if we have previous data for this interface\n\t\tif prev, exists := sc.prevNetCounters[current.Name]; exists && duration > 0 {\n\t\t\trecvDelta := current.BytesRecv - prev.BytesRecv\n\t\t\tsentDelta := current.BytesSent - prev.BytesSent\n\n\t\t\t// Handle counter wrap-around (though unlikely with uint64)\n\t\t\tif recvDelta < current.BytesRecv { // Wrap detected\n\t\t\t\trecvDelta = current.BytesRecv\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif sentDelta < current.BytesSent { // Wrap detected\n\t\t\t\tsentDelta = current.BytesSent\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tifaceMetrics.RecvBytesPerSec = float64(recvDelta) / duration\n\t\t\tifaceMetrics.SentBytesPerSec = float64(sentDelta) / duration\n\n\t\t\ttotalRecvRate += panelStyle\n\n\tvar lines []string\n\n\t// Title\n\tlines = append(lines, successStyle.Render(\"📡 Network I/O\"))\n\n\tcontentWidth := width - 4 // Account for borders and padding\n\n\t// Show aggregate rates if available\n\tif d.systemMetrics.NetIO.Error == nil {\n\t\t// Calculate width for rate bars - leave room for labels and values\n\t\t// Format: \"Recv [||||...] XX.XX KB/s\"\n\t\tmaxRateWidth := 12 // \"XXX.XX KB/s\"\n\t\trateBarWidth := contentWidth - 6 - maxRateWidth // \"Recv \" + bar + \" rate\"\n\t\tif rateBarWidth < 8 {\n\t\t\trateBarWidth = 8\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Normalize rates for bar display (cap at 10 MB/s for full bar)\n\t\tconst maxDisplayRate = 10 * 1024 * 1024 // 10 MB/s\n\t\trecvPercent := (d.systemMetrics.NetIO.RecvBytesPerSec / maxDisplayRate) * 100\n\t\tsentPercent := (d.systemMetrics.NetIO.SentBytesPerSec / maxDisplayRate) * 100\n\t\tif recvPercent > 100 {\n\t\t\trecvPercent = 100\n\t\t}\n\t\tif sentPercent > 100 rateBarWidth), sentRate))\n\t} else {\n\t\tlines = append(lines, errorStyle.Render(\"Aggregate: N/A\"))\n\t}\n\n\t// Separator\n\tlines = append(lines, \"\")\n\n\t// Per-interface breakdown\n\tif metrics.FormatBytes(iface.TotalRecvBytes)\n\t\t\ttotalSent := metrics.FormatBytes(iface.TotalSentBytes)\n\n\t\t\t// Format: \"ifaceName: ↓ rate  ↑ rate  | ↓ total  ↑ total\"\n\t\t\t// Using unicode arrows for direction indicators\n\t\t\tlines = append(lines, fmt.Sprintf(\"%-*s ↓ %-*s ↑ %-*s  | ↓ %-*s ↑ %s\",\n\t\t\t\tifaceNameWidth, iface.Name,\n\t\t\t\trateWidth, recvRate,\n\t\t\t\trateWidth, 9:00 AM\",\n\t\t\tGetTime:     metrics.GetMondayNineAM,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tName:        \"Today\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"Since midnight today\",\n\t\t\tGetTime: func() time.Time {\n\t\t\t\tnow := *Dashboard) checkForUpdates() tea.Cmd {\n\treturn func() tea.Msg {\n\t\tinfo := d.updater.CheckForUpdate()\n\t\treturn updateCheckMsg{info: info}\n\t}\n}\n\n// Update handles messages\nfunc (d *Dashboard) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {\n\tswitch msg := msg.(type) {\n\tcase tea.WindowSizeMsg:\n\t\td.width = msg.Width\n\t\td.height = msg.Height\n\t\td.updateLayout()\n\t\treturn d, nil\n\n\tcase tea.KeyMsg:\n\t\t// Handle lookback picker mode\n\t\tif d.lookbackMode {\n\t\t\treturn d.handleLookbackKey(msg)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch msg.String() {\n\t\tcase \"q\",
